COMMON HEALTH PROBLEMS RELATED TO BREASTFEEDING
# COMMON HEALTH PROBLEMS RELATED TO BREASTFEEDING
Breastfeeding may cause minor problems for babies such as colic, spitting up or vomiting after feeds, constipation etc..
SRC010_CHUNK_11_1_0_0_0_0:
COMMON HEALTH PROBLEMS RELATED TO BREASTFEEDING > COLIC:
## COLIC:
- The word 'colic' is used to describe long periods of crying punctuated by moments where the baby seems happy and comfortable. Crying is often loud with the infant drawing up the knees and clinching the fists. Movements may be rapid. Colic happens any time of the day, but most often at night.
- Colic is normal in babies, as it happens due to the immaturity of the digestive system of newborns.
- Colic often results from the retaining of excessive air inside the baby's intestine, or mother's tension or allergy to certain foods.
- Colic happens when the mother takes certain foods, such as cow milk, spicy food, chocolate, caffeine, onion, banana, grapes, etc. this is why mothers needs to note and avoid foods that cause colic to the baby.
- Bottle-feeding may cause colic, as formula milk contains animal fats or palm oil in particular.
- The baby may cry for many other reasons, such as hunger, fatigue, and sickness. Parents must recognize the different kinds of crying as long as they can and in case of uncertainty, they may consult a physician.
SRC010_CHUNK_11_1_1_0_0_0:
COMMON HEALTH PROBLEMS RELATED TO BREASTFEEDING > COLIC: > TIPS FOR TREATMENT OF COLIC
### TIPS FOR TREATMENT OF COLIC
- While breastfeeding, it is important that the mother need to give her baby plenty of time to pass out wind that causes colic and to use those various methods to help in passing wind mentioned below.
- To hold the baby, place the baby face down on her thighs or hold him to her shoulder while supporting the baby head with your hand, while resting on your lap, and tap his back. She can also hold him close to her body as a kangaroo does. This is called the kangaroo position. She may try these positions during bouts of crying as well.
- To give the baby warm baths and massage his body. This will help him relax and get rid of colic.
![Picture 60](images/SRC010/picture-060.png)
![Picture 61](images/SRC010/picture-061.png)
SRC010_CHUNK_11_2_0_0_0_0:
COMMON HEALTH PROBLEMS RELATED TO BREASTFEEDING > SPITTING UP OR VOMITING AFTER FEEDS
## SPITTING UP OR VOMITING AFTER FEEDS
Babies often spit up some milk or vomit shortly after feeds. He/she may cry or feel irritated after feeds. Most often, this results from swallowing small amounts of air into the baby's stomach during feeds. This is common and mother should not be worried. If vomiting is accompanied with other symptoms, it can be a reason to consult a physician without delay, namely:
- If the baby vomits several times at short intervals (e.g. every two hours).
- If vomiting is associated with high temperature, diarrhea or rash.
- If baby refused breastfeeding.
- If a mother is too worried about her baby.
SRC010_CHUNK_11_2_1_0_0_0:
COMMON HEALTH PROBLEMS RELATED TO BREASTFEEDING > SPITTING UP OR VOMITING AFTER FEEDS > Tips for Treatment of Spitting up or Vomiting
### Tips for Treatment of Spitting up or Vomiting
- Feeding the baby for short periods helps his stomach to accommodate the amount of milk better.
- Help the baby release out air by burping every few minutes during a feed instead of waiting until the end of a breastfeed.
- Change the baby position during breastfeeding. It is preferable to breastfeed while the baby is in a more upright position and close to the mother's body. This is called the kangaroo position because it is similar to the way the kangaroo holds its offspring; this will help the food to settle in his stomach.
- Avoid bottle-feeding or adding formula milk.
![Picture 62](images/SRC010/picture-062.png)
SRC010_CHUNK_11_3_0_0_0_0:
COMMON HEALTH PROBLEMS RELATED TO BREASTFEEDING > CONSTIPATION
## CONSTIPATION
- The stool of a breastfed baby is usually soft, massed and has a mustard yellow color, with small granular pieces.
- If the baby is passing stool in the form or hard waste at wide intervals, this is called constipation.
- Constipation often occurs when formula milk or additional foods are introducing to the infant's diet.
- If constipated, the baby will feel pain, blush and cry while discharging stools. Constipation is normal, but when it is accompanied with the bloody stool or when the color of the stool changes, or when the mother is too worried, a physician must be consulted without delay.
SRC010_CHUNK_11_3_1_0_0_0:
COMMON HEALTH PROBLEMS RELATED TO BREASTFEEDING > CONSTIPATION > Tips for treatment of constipation
### Tips for treatment of constipation
- Breastfeed more often this will ensure that the baby is receiving a large quantity of liquids already contained in breast milk. Avoid offering formula milk, that which contains animal fats or palm oil.
- Give the baby laxatives, herbal infusions, or medicines only as per instruction of a physician.
SRC010_CHUNK_12_1_0_0_0_0:
WEANING > Supplementary feeding of babies
## Supplementary feeding of babies
- Weaning is the addition of supplementary semi-solid and solid foods to the child's diet.
- Weaning starts gradually at the beginning of the sixth month until the child gets used to the new foods. These foods should be complementary and not substitute to breast milk.
- Weaning continues up to the end of the twelfth month, when the child can eat the family's regular food.
- It is necessary to continue breastfeeding throughout the weaning period until the child turns two years old.
SRC010_CHUNK_13_0_0_0_0_0:
CHILD GROWTH AND DEVELOPMENT
# CHILD GROWTH AND DEVELOPMENT
- Mother's breast milk helps the infant's natural growth and proper psychological and mental development.
- Contains all the essential nutrients that infants needs to grow in optimal proportions according to your child's age, weight and length.
- Contains several ingredients that promote good development of the brain and nervous system.
- Newborns who were fed breast milk are more intelligent.
![Picture 63](images/SRC010/picture-063.png)
SRC010_CHUNK_14_0_0_0_0_0:
REMEMBER
# REMEMBER
- Breast milk is the best and complete food for babies for the first six months.
- No other milk similar to mother milk.
![Picture 64](images/SRC010/picture-064.png)

Community Midwifery Postnatal Care Service
## Community Midwifery Postnatal Care Service
Home care is a new service provided to you after delivery and discharge from the hospital. This new kind of care for postnatal women is called the 'Community  Midwifery Postnatal Care Service'. We are providing you with this information so that you are informed and can understand what the new service is all about.
SRC011_CHUNK_0_1_1_0_0_0:
Community Midwifery Postnatal Care Service > What Is the Community  Midwifery Postnatal Care Service?
### What Is the Community  Midwifery Postnatal Care Service?
This is a new service that will support you and your baby during early days after delivery. The midwife who visits you at home will provide you and baby, with clinical care to promote the physical and psychological health and wellbeing for you and your baby.
- Information and education relating to the normal changes associated with childbirth.
- Breastfeeding education and support.
- Providing information to you in order to recognise signs of illness in yourself and your babies and where to access help.
- Promote long term physical and emotional wellbeing.
- Support you and your family to build the confidence to manage the care of your baby.

### Why is the Community  Midwifery Postnatal Care Service being offered?
This service has been introduced into Qatar:
- To provide care and support at a level determined in partnership with you.
- To ensure the health and wellbeing of both a mother and her baby after the birth is maintained.

- Home address.
- Telephone/ Mobile Number.
A member of the community midwifery team will call you to arrange a suitable time to visit you.

#### Schedule of visits:
An appointment follow-up will be arranged for you as follows:
- First face to face visit between 3-5 days after C- Section.
- Second Postnatal contact face to face or Telephone consultation between 7th day to 14th day Postpartim.
Most women will receive two Postnatal contact (face to face visit and Telephone call) depending on the day of discharge from hospital. A third visit can be arranged if Clinically indicated.

### Post-natal visits - What to expect:
During each visit, your midwife will carry out a range of procedures to monitor and assess you and your baby's development. These include:

#### For the mother:
A full examination : general well-being:
- Breast check, uterus,post caesarean wound, perineum, legs, bowels, voiding (bladder), blood pressure /pulse/temperature and dietary intake.
- Calf muscle examination - assess for swelling and tenderness.
- Emotional assessment - discuss any worries /low mood or concerns you might have.
- Provide support on breastfeeding issues and successful exclusive breastfeeding.

A well-baby check including :

2. General condition of the baby:- Vital signs, color of the skin.
3. Feeding pattern & cues.
4. Sleeping pattern and settling techniques.
5. Elimination (bowel and bladder).
6. Safety Issues.
7. Post circumcision care.
8. Immunization.
9. Follow up visits.

Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar
# Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar
As Qatar's population continues to grow and its demography changing, likewise is our plan at Hamad Medical Corporation to transform the country's healthcare landscape, especially in ensuring continuous provision of state-of-the-art maternity healthcare services to all women in Qatar and the region.
Providing high-quality healthcare delivered by top clinicians working to international standards and best practice, all HMC's maternity services, offered at Women's Wellness and Research Center, The Cuban Hospital, Al Khor Hospital, Al Wakra Hospital and Sidra Medicine, are top notch and women in Qatar have many choices of where they could have their babies closer to their homes.
This guide to maternity services in Qatar offers you a clear and comprehensive overview of how to access maternity services across all HMC's maternity hospitals, Primary Health Care Corporation, Sidra Medicine and other private sector hospitals. The information in this guide is useful for all pregnant women (and their spouses as well as other family members) as it clarifies the healthcare pathway for them at all maternity hospitals in Qatar starting off from the primary health care.

Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar > Who provides maternity services in Qatar?
## Who provides maternity services in Qatar?
Hamad Medical Corporation is the leading public healthcare provider in the State of Qatar. The Corporation offers high quality family-centered maternity care to all women in the country at its four maternity hospitals - Women's Wellness and Research Center, The Cuban Hospital, Al Khor Hospital and Al Wakra Hospital. All the hospitals have Women's Urgent Care and Obstetric Triage services.
Women in Qatar also have the options to access maternity care offered by the private sector hospitals including Sidra Medicine.
As the first point of contact for women once they become pregnant, the Primary Health Care Corporation offers a broad range of antenatal care services across all its health centers to women in their first and second trimesters. However, private hospitals offer services to women from the beginning of their pregnancy until delivery.
SRC012_CHUNK_1_5_1_0_0_0:
Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar > Who provides maternity services in Qatar? > PRIMARY HEALTH CARE CORPORATION (PHCC)
### PRIMARY HEALTH CARE CORPORATION (PHCC)

Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar > Who provides maternity services in Qatar? > PRIMARY HEALTH CARE CORPORATION (PHCC) > About Primary Health Care Corporation
#### About Primary Health Care Corporation
Primary Health Care Corporation operates 28 health centers across Qatar, delivering community-based primary care services to Qatar's population in all parts of the country. These primary health centers provide a wide range of preventive, diagnostic and treatment healthcare services, including dental, antenatal care, post-natal care including home visits, family planning programs, diet and nutrition counselling, immunization, pharmacy, lab, ophthalmology, audiology, radiology and wellness services.

#### What antenatal services are available at PHCC?
When you visit a health center, your family physician will conduct an initial pregnancy test followed by an antenatal package which includes all the needed initial lab investigations and ultrasound screening and appointment for the follow up visit.
A primary health care physician can also request ultrasound checks and fetal heart monitoring for you during your visits. PHCC holds weekly antenatal classes to provide vital education to expectant mums about their health in pregnancy and after delivery.

#### How you can contact the Primary Health Care Corporation?
You can contact the PHCC by calling their customer service team, Hayyak on 107 for all your primary health care needs. PHCC is sending SMS to all post-natal mothers with the contact number of Maternal and Child Health Counsellors.

#### Primary health care centers as your first point of call
The PHCC offers high quality antenatal care to all pregnant women in Qatar throughout their first and second trimester making sure the baby and the mother are doing fine.
PHCC physicians are well trained to look after pregnant women at the Antenatal Clinics spread across all the primary health centers in the country. If your primary care doctor determines that you need more specialized care, which is not available at the primary health centers or your pregnancy has reached 28 weeks or above, they will refer you to any of HMC's maternity hospitals.

#### How can you book an appointment at a primary health center?
You can book an appointment by calling the customer service team, Hayyak on 107 or by walking into your nearest health center to directly book your appointment. Every woman availing maternity care at the PHC will need to provide a health card, a sponsor's letter, QID or passport, residential building number, copy of a marriage certificate or other proof of marriage document as well as husband's QID or passport.

#### Do you have to pay for services at primary health centers?
All Qatar residents with valid health cards are entitled to subsidized consultations and prescriptions at the PHCC. Without valid health card, you will be charged higher fees for services. Some emergency medical services are provided free of charge. Please note that all payments are made with a credit, debit or e-cash (QNB) card.

Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar > Who provides maternity services in Qatar? > Tertiary and general maternity care facilities in Qatar
### Tertiary and general maternity care facilities in Qatar
Being the leading public healthcare facility in Qatar, Hamad Medical Corporation is committed to providing cutting-edge specialized tertiary care to all patients in need of rehabilitation, long term and lifelong care, including pregnancy and newborn care.  All HMC's tertiary and general maternity hospitals have been designed to address the specific healthcare needs of women throughout all stages of their lives. By following international best practices, HMC is committed to providing women with unrivaled, high-quality care by a multidisciplinary team, who are qualified in women's health.
HMC has one tertiary level maternity hospital - Women's Wellness and Research Center and three general maternity hospitals - Al Khor Hospital, Al Wakra Hospital and The Cuban Hospital - catering to all reproductive needs of women across the country. These maternity facilities receive pregnant women in their third trimester from the PHCC (according to whether their pregnancy is progressing normally or is classified as high-risk) to continue their antenatal care until they safely deliver.
Seeking to provide evidence-based care (including high quality maternity care), all HMC hospitals, including the maternity hospitals, are Academic Health Centers as the corporation is evolving into a thriving Academic Health System that links together health, education and research, powered by the synergies between itself and its academic partners including Weill Cornell Medicine, Qatar University, the University of Calgary - Qatar, College of the North Atlantic - Qatar, Sidra Medicine, and Primary Health Care Corporation.
Committed to delivering the safest, most effective and most compassionate care to each and every one of its patients, HMC has achieved the significant distinction of becoming the first healthcare system across the globe to have all its hospitals accredited by Joint Commission International (JCI) under the Academic Medical Center accreditation program. HMC is also the first hospital system in the Middle East to achieve institutional accreditation from the Accreditation Council for Graduate Medical Education (ACGME) International LLC, which demonstrates excellence in the way medical graduates are trained through residency, internship and fellowship programs.
SRC012_CHUNK_1_5_2_1_0_0:
Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar > Who provides maternity services in Qatar? > Tertiary and general maternity care facilities in Qatar > Get to know the tertiary hospital

SRC012_CHUNK_1_5_2_1_1_0:
Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar > Who provides maternity services in Qatar? > Tertiary and general maternity care facilities in Qatar > Get to know the tertiary hospital > About Women's Wellness and Research Center (WWRC)
##### About Women's Wellness and Research Center (WWRC)
Women's Wellness and Research Center is the largest women's tertiary hospital in the country dedicated to delivering family-centered care to women and newborns. The hospital, opened in 2018, is equipped with a large Emergency Department with an expanded visitor waiting area, seven Operating Theatres, 26 Labor and Delivery rooms, over 240 inpatient rooms with bathrooms and a number of specialized outpatient clinics for Obstetrics and Gynecology. In addition, it has more than 100 Neonatal Intensive Care Unit cots for the care of critically ill newborns.
This facility has over 2,000 highly trained staff who have extensive experience in gynecology, obstetrics, and newborn care. It provides specialized care services to up to 30,000 women monthly through all stages of their life.
SRC012_CHUNK_1_5_2_1_1_1:
Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar > Who provides maternity services in Qatar? > Tertiary and general maternity care facilities in Qatar > Get to know the tertiary hospital > About Women's Wellness and Research Center (WWRC) > Where is WWRC Located?
###### Where is WWRC Located?
WWRC is located within Hamad Bin Khalifa Medical City campus next to the Ambulatory Care Center and Qatar Rehabilitation Institute.
![Picture 33](images/SRC012/picture-033.png)
SRC012_CHUNK_1_5_2_1_1_2:
Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar > Who provides maternity services in Qatar? > Tertiary and general maternity care facilities in Qatar > Get to know the tertiary hospital > About Women's Wellness and Research Center (WWRC) > What antenatal services are offered at WWRC?
###### What antenatal services are offered at WWRC?
WWRC works in collaboration with Hamad Medical Corporation's partners at PHCC, Sidra Medicine and other private sector hospitals to provide the best possible antenatal care for pregnant women and their babies.
Antenatal care at WWRC is available to normal obstetric patient with pregnancy above 34 weeks and high-risk patient with pregnancy below 34 weeks. These antenatal services are provided by a multidisciplinary team comprising medical staff, nursing staff, midwives, dieticians, patient educators and physiotherapists.
The routine antenatal care on offer for women at WWRC include checking of vital signs including blood and urine tests and abdominal examination to ensure baby is growing normally and lying in the correct position. Women also receive advice regarding diet, exercise and their general health.
The WWRC's Patient Family Education Unit conducts daily and free Childbirth Education classes as part of expectant mums' routine antenatal care to educate them about the importance of keeping healthy throughout their pregnancy and after delivery.
Other services available to support obstetric patients are Phlebotomy, Pharmacy, Radiology, Cashier, Nesmaak and Security. Moreover, obstetric patient requiring admission can be admitted in WWRC Inpatient area, Labor Room and High Dependency Area.
![Picture 34](images/SRC012/picture-034.png)
SRC012_CHUNK_1_5_2_1_1_3:
Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar > Who provides maternity services in Qatar? > Tertiary and general maternity care facilities in Qatar > Get to know the tertiary hospital > About Women's Wellness and Research Center (WWRC) > What other specialized services are offered at WWRC?
###### What other specialized services are offered at WWRC?
At HMC, maternity services are tailored to each woman's needs. Should a patient have a higher risk pregnancy, her general obstetrician will work closely with teams from across WWRC. Obstetric patients requiring specialty care can be referred according to their needs. Specialty Clinics that are available in WWRC are Feto-Maternal Unit, Gestational Diabetic Clinic, Internal Medicine, Cardiology, Early Pregnancy Clinic, Hematology, Perinatal Wellness and ADAU (Antenatal Day Assessment Unit).
- Feto-Maternal Unit provides maternal and fetal care. It focuses on the management of high-risk pregnancies through consultation, prenatal and perinatal counselling with a multidisciplinary team.
- Integrated Care for Diabetes in Pregnancy is part of National Diabetic Center (NDC). It provides consultation services, comprehensive management, diabetic education and management of thyroid disorder in pregnancy.
- General Internal Medicine Clinic provides timely follow-up and management of WWRC patients that require general medical outpatient review.
- Hematology Clinic - part of General Hematology Clinic services offer follow-up services for all obstetrics and gynecology patients with hematology disorders.
- Perinatal Wellness Clinic provides effective, evidence-based mental health assessment, diagnosis and treatment for patients attending WWRC.
![Picture 35](images/SRC012/picture-035.png)
- Maternity Cardiology Clinic provides consultation and determination of cardiac risk for women who are pregnant, specialized cardiac care for women throughout their pregnancies and follow-up of post-partum cases up to one year.
- ADAU (Antenatal Day Assessment Unit) - This service applies to all women with high risk pregnancies and post-delivery up to 42 days needing intervention on a day care basis.
- Midwifery Led Clinic is part of Midwifery Model of Care being run by midwives. It provides antenatal care for low risk pregnant mother. This clinic is under indirect supervision of obstetricians.
- WWRC's Outpatient Department also offers gynecology specialized care, like uro-gynecology, gyne-oncology, office hysteroscopy, MVA (manual vacuum aspiration), RPL (Repeated Pregnancy Loss), HRT (Hormone Replacement Therapy) and mis-miscarriage clinic.
WWRC's OPD is also providing services that are focused on neonates and pediatrics up to two years of age. The services include follow-up care of high risk and low risk babies. Newborn Screening Unit is also part of OPD where screening of all newborn babies in WWRC are being done. This unit also follows up on results of all newborn screening done in different health care facilities in Qatar.
In addition, the Outpatient service has Breast Care Triple Assessment Unit - an established hospital-based assessment that allows for early and rapid detection of breast cancer.

##### Labor and Delivery
Women delivering at WWRC are looked after by one of the highly specialized obstetric teams and a dedicated support staff of nurses and midwives. Following delivery, women and their newborns are brought directly to one of WWRC's inpatient rooms with bathrooms. With large windows and beautiful views of the Corniche, these spaces have been designed to promote mother-baby bonding and encourage rest and recovery.

##### Postnatal Support Clinics
WWRC offers a daily lactation clinic to support new mothers who are having difficulty breastfeeding, or who need reassurance about breastfeeding. The hospital's experienced clinicians offer information on a variety of topics including the importance of skin-to-skin contact, feeding cues and weaning, hand and manual milk expression and feeding positions that are comfortable for mother and baby.

Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar > Who provides maternity services in Qatar? > Tertiary and general maternity care facilities in Qatar > Get to know the tertiary hospital > Patient Family Education Unit
##### Patient Family Education Unit
The WWRC's Patient Family Education unit (PFE) conducts daily and free education sessions five days in a week to all mothers registered for antenatal services at the WWRC. The education programs are organized as individual or group education sessions covering antenatal, postnatal, breastfeeding, newborn care, and gynecology care. PFE also launched Childbirth Education classes, both in face-to-face and virtual sessions, for pregnant women to educate them about their general health in pregnancy and what to expect during and after delivery. These classes are helping to build confidence in mothers' ability to give birth and also provide an opportunity to discuss their fears about labor and birth with the educator and share experience with other women with the same concerns.

##### Community Midwifery Home Care Services
Under the Postnatal Community Midwifery Home Care services, a team of midwives and nursing assistances provide postpartum specialized care to women, who have experienced a high-risk pregnancy or given birth by Caesarian section in the comfort of their homes. They help the women and their newborns receive prompt post-delivery care, get a referral to primary health care or to Mobile Doctors for any abnormality thus reducing the need to visit an emergency department for non-urgent reason or getting admitted to the hospital. The midwifery team makes two visits to the patients. The first visit is within 72 hours after birth while the follow up visit is conducted 7 to 14 days after birth.

Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar > Who provides maternity services in Qatar? > Important tips for your health and wellbeing in pregnancy
### Important tips for your health and wellbeing in pregnancy
- Eating a healthy diet and keeping active can keep you healthy throughout and give your baby the best possible start in life.
- Women who eat well and exercise regularly along with regular prenatal care are less likely to have complications during pregnancy.
- Women who eat well and live healthily during pregnancy are also more likely to successfully give birth to a healthy baby.
- Have breakfast every day as this will help you to avoid snacking on foods that are high in fat and sugar.
- Fruit and vegetables as well as minerals and vitamins provide fiber, which helps digestion and prevents constipation. So, eat 3 to 5 servings of a variety of colorful raw vegetables and fruits per day.
- Eat moderate amounts of protein each day. Choose lean meat, remove the skin from poultry and cook them well using only a little fat. Try to eat two portions of fish a week.
- Eat 2 to 3 portions of dairy foods like cheese, milk or yogurt a day, using low-fat varieties whenever you can.
SRC012_CHUNK_1_5_4_1_0_0:
Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar > Who provides maternity services in Qatar? > Important tips for your health and wellbeing in pregnancy > Food to avoid in pregnancy
#### Food to avoid in pregnancy
- There are some foods that you should not eat when you are pregnant because they may make you ill or harm your baby.
- Avoid partially cooked eggs or undercooked meat, unpasteurized milk, some types of fish - shark, marlin and swordfish. Also limit eating tuna.
- Avoid mould-ripened soft cheese like Brie, Camembert and others with a similar rind.
SRC012_CHUNK_1_5_4_2_0_0:
Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar > Who provides maternity services in Qatar? > Important tips for your health and wellbeing in pregnancy > Ensure to watch your weight
#### Ensure to watch your weight
- Most women gain between 10kg and 12.5kg (22 to 28lb) while pregnant.
- Weight gain varies a great deal and depends on your weight before pregnancy.
- Putting on too much weight can affect your health.
- However, you do not need to diet, but only to eat healthily and keep up your normal daily activity or exercise.
SRC012_CHUNK_1_5_4_3_0_0:
Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar > Who provides maternity services in Qatar? > Important tips for your health and wellbeing in pregnancy > Be physically active
#### Be physically active
- The more active and fit you are during pregnancy, the easier it will be for you to adapt to your changing shape and weight gain.
- Try to fit mild to moderate exercises such as stomach strengthening, pelvic tilt and floor exercises, and feet exercises into your daily routine.
- These exercises will strengthen your muscles so that you can carry extra weight, make your joints stronger, ease backache and generally make you feel well.
SRC012_CHUNK_1_5_4_4_0_0:
Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar > Who provides maternity services in Qatar? > Important tips for your health and wellbeing in pregnancy > Pregnancy and Respiratory Infections
#### Pregnancy and Respiratory Infections
- Due to changes in their bodies and immune systems, it is known that pregnant women can be badly affected by some respiratory infections like coronavirus (COVID-19). It is therefore important that pregnant women take precautions to protect themselves against such infections. If you fell sick, you should immediately report possible symptoms including fever, cough or difficulty breathing to your healthcare provider.
- There is more information on pregnancy and COVID-19 on www.moph.qa.
SRC012_CHUNK_1_5_5_0_0_0:
Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar > Who provides maternity services in Qatar? > Breastfeeding Tips
### Breastfeeding Tips
- All babies need to be fed with their mothers' breastmilk because it contains ideal nutrients for all babies. Breastmilk contains everything the baby needs in best quality and quantity. It protects babies from common acute and chronic illnesses. Breastfeeding benefits babies, mothers and families.
- Mothers who chose to breastfeed should initiate breastfeeding immediately after birth and express their milk within the first 2 to 6 hours of delivery. If they are not able to breastfeed, they need to express breastmilk by hand or by using a breast pump.

### You want to know more? Here are some frequently asked questions about giving birth?
SRC012_CHUNK_1_6_1_1_0_0:
Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar > FAQs > You want to know more? Here are some frequently asked questions about giving birth? > Q. Where can I have my baby at HMC?
#### Q. Where can I have my baby at HMC?
A. You can give birth at any HMC's maternity hospitals, but it is best to choose the one near to your home for more convenience and easy access.
If your pregnancy is considered normal, you will likely have received your antenatal care in the maternity unit at one of our four maternity hospitals closest to your home. This is the hospital which you will be visiting if you think you are in labor.
If you have been categorized with having a pregnancy which is more complicated or high risk you will be delivering at the Women's Wellness and Research Center.
SRC012_CHUNK_1_6_1_2_0_0:
Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar > FAQs > You want to know more? Here are some frequently asked questions about giving birth? > Q. When should I come to the hospital?
#### Q. When should I come to the hospital?
A. You should go to your designated hospital if you are experiencing one of the following:
- You feel your water break
- You start bleeding
- You no longer feel baby move
- You are feeling abdominal pain
- You have a fall or sustain trauma to the abdomen
- You have vomiting and diarrhea
- You have itchy hands and feet
- You have a headache or visual disturbances
- You experience frequency in passing urine
- You are generally feeling unwell

Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar > FAQs > You want to know more? Here are some frequently asked questions about giving birth? > Q. How do I know I'm in labor? > A. You are in labor if:
##### A. You are in labor if:
- You are experiencing regular abdominal pains every 2 to 3 minutes in 10-minute duration. It may be helpful to have your husband/mother/sister time how often these are occurring within a 10-minute span.
- You feel a gush of fluid or a trickle of liquid coming out of your vagina. This is referred to as a 'Spontaneous Rupture of Membrane'.
- You've seen mucus dislodging from your vagina or blood.
- You feel pressure on your bladder, or you are urinating frequently.
- You are experiencing diarrhea/nausea/vomiting.
If you are experiencing all of the above, then you may be in labor. Please ask a friend or family member to drop you off at the emergency entrance of the WWRC (or the hospital you have been booked into for delivery), where our care team will further assess you.
If your labor has not yet sufficiently progressed and you are not ready to deliver in the near future, you will either be kept for observation or sent home with instructions.
SRC012_CHUNK_1_6_1_4_0_0:
Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar > FAQs > You want to know more? Here are some frequently asked questions about giving birth? > Q. How do I know which birthing option is best for me?
#### Q. How do I know which birthing option is best for me?
A. If you are in labor, our team from the Emergency Department will transfer you to the Labor and Delivery unit or the operating theater. Based on their assessment of both your health and that of your baby, our team of doctors, midwives and nurses will recommend a vaginal or a C-section led delivery.
SRC012_CHUNK_1_6_1_5_0_0:
Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar > FAQs > You want to know more? Here are some frequently asked questions about giving birth? > Q. What should I bring with me to the hospital when coming to deliver?
#### Q. What should I bring with me to the hospital when coming to deliver?
A. You should bring a prepacked bag containing the following items:
SRC012_CHUNK_1_6_1_5_1_0:
Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar > FAQs > You want to know more? Here are some frequently asked questions about giving birth? > Q. What should I bring with me to the hospital when coming to deliver? > For you:
##### For you:
- Something comfortable to wear during labor
- Good support bras
- Breast pads
- Maternity panties
- Maternity pads
- Night dress/pajamas
- A pair of slippers
- Toiletries/Vaseline/lip balm
- Face cloth and large towel
- Hair band
- Outfit to wear when going home
SRC012_CHUNK_1_6_1_5_2_0:
Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar > FAQs > You want to know more? Here are some frequently asked questions about giving birth? > Q. What should I bring with me to the hospital when coming to deliver? > For baby:
##### For baby:
- Diapers/nappies (I pack)
- Baby wipes
- Hat/bonnet (2 pieces)
- Vests/singlet (3 to 4 pieces)
- Scratch mittens and socks
- Baby suit (3 pieces)
- Baby blanket (3 pieces)
- Baby shawl (2 pieces)
SRC012_CHUNK_1_6_1_6_0_0:
Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar > FAQs > You want to know more? Here are some frequently asked questions about giving birth? > Q. Why can't I just walk-in to any HMC's maternity hospital and be seen by a doctor?
#### Q. Why can't I just walk-in to any HMC's maternity hospital and be seen by a doctor?
A. HMC's maternity hospitals provide secondary and tertiary level care to women whose needs are too complex to be treated at a primary care center. This is why most services can only be accessed through referrals from primary care center, other HMC facilities or the private sector.
SRC012_CHUNK_1_6_2_0_0_0:
Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar > FAQs > What do I need to know about breastfeeding my baby?
### What do I need to know about breastfeeding my baby?
A. Mother's milk has been proven to be the best food for all babies because it contains all the nutrients that baby needs for normal growth and brain development. Breastmilk is also being described as baby's first immunization against acute infections, common childhood illnesses, and chronic diseases like diabetes, heart diseases, overweight and obesity.
SRC012_CHUNK_1_6_2_1_0_0:
Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar > FAQs > What do I need to know about breastfeeding my baby? > Follow these tips to successfully breastfeed:
#### Follow these tips to successfully breastfeed:
- Be self-confident and comfortable both physically and mentally.
- Maintain eye contact, touch, talk or cuddle the baby.
- Initiate early breastfeeding and practice regular skin-to-skin contact at least 6 to 8 times a day.
- Put baby to breast whenever he/she shows signs of hunger or to feed the baby often between 8 to 12 times a day because baby's stomach is small.
SRC012_CHUNK_1_6_2_2_0_0:
Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar > FAQs > What do I need to know about breastfeeding my baby? > Q. I am a working mum, how can I safely express my milk to feed my baby while I am away work?
#### Q. I am a working mum, how can I safely express my milk to feed my baby while I am away work?
A. If you're a working mom that will be returning to work but still wants to continue breastfeeding, you should start practicing how to express breast milk after birth at least within 2 to 6 hours. Y ou can express breastmilk by hand or by using a breast pump.
SRC012_CHUNK_1_6_2_2_1_0:
Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar > FAQs > What do I need to know about breastfeeding my baby? > Q. I am a working mum, how can I safely express my milk to feed my baby while I am away work? > Take note of the following tips:
##### Take note of the following tips:
- It is advisable to express breastmilk by the baby's bedside.
- Pump the breast often and intervals should not exceed more than 4 hours and the length of each expression should be within 10 to 15 minutes.
- Ensure to empty the breast completely to maintain milk production.
- You may need a portable cooler/ice box with ice packs to carry expressed breastmilk if the baby is separated from you.
SRC012_CHUNK_1_6_2_3_0_0:
Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar > FAQs > What do I need to know about breastfeeding my baby? > Q. How do I feed refrigerated or frozen breastmilk to my baby?
#### Q. How do I feed refrigerated or frozen breastmilk to my baby?
A. Once expressed and if you do not need it straight away, the breastmilk should be stored correctly to prevent it from spoiling. Store in a sterile container to be sealed with a lid and not with a bottle teat as the hole in the teat can allow bacteria into the container. In order to use the oldest milk first (first in first out), the container should be numbered and labeled before refrigerating or freezing the milk.
SRC012_CHUNK_1_6_2_3_1_0:
Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar > FAQs > What do I need to know about breastfeeding my baby? > Q. How do I feed refrigerated or frozen breastmilk to my baby? > Take note of the following tips to warm and thaw expressed breastmilk:
##### Take note of the following tips to warm and thaw expressed breastmilk:
Freshly expressed breastmilk: if the expressed breastmilk is kept under room temperature, it can be given directly without warming.
Refrigerated breastmilk: if the breastmilk is cold, place the bottle in a bowl of warm water or hold the bottle under cold running water then slowly run warm water until it thaws.
SRC012_CHUNK_1_6_2_3_1_1:
Guide to Maternity Services in Qatar > FAQs > What do I need to know about breastfeeding my baby? > Q. How do I feed refrigerated or frozen breastmilk to my baby? > Take note of the following tips to warm and thaw expressed breastmilk: > Frozen breastmilk:
###### Frozen breastmilk:
- Put the bottle or bag in the refrigerator overnight, hold it under warm running water, or set it in a container of warm water.
- Once fully thawed, it may be kept at room temperature for a maximum of two hours or in the refrigerator for up to 24 hours.
- Don't thaw or heat frozen breast milk in gas stove, microwave or in boiling water.
- Thawed breast milk left at room temperature should be fed to your baby within two hours.
- Never re-freeze breast milk once thawed.

# QATAR DIETARY GUIDELINES FOR MOTHER AND CHILD (0-5 YEARS)

SRC013_CHUNK_2_0_0_0_0_0:
Foreword
# Foreword
The Qatar Dietary Guidelines for Mother and Child (0-5 Years) have been  developed  based  on  our  belief  that  the  health  and  well-being  of mothers  and  young  children  form  the  foundation  for  a  thriving  society. These guidelines provide clear, evidence-based recommendations aimed at improving  the  nutritional  status  and  overall  health  of  women  before  and during pregnancy, and after giving birth, as well as during the early years of the child's life. The guidelines address key stages-starting from preconception, through pregnancy and lactation, and extending into infancy and early  childhood.  It  underscores  the  importance  of  adopting  a  healthy lifestyle that promotes the well-being of both mother and child. Moreover, these  guidelines  serve  as  a  vital  resource  for  healthcare  providers  and families. Qatar Dietary Guidelines for Mother and Child (0-5 Years)
The guidelines are divided into seven chapters that address various essential topics  such  as  diet  and  lifestyle  before  pregnancy;  during  pregnancy; postpartum;  breastfeeding;  complementary  feeding;  nutrition  for  toddlers and  preschoolers;  and  the  importance  of  selecting  healthy  fats  while reducing  sugar  and  salt  intake.  Each  chapter  is  designed  to  empower individuals with practical advice to foster healthy habits and make informed decisions.
The Health Promotion Department at the Ministry of Public Health hopes that  these  guidelines  will  be  used  as  a  scientific  resource  and  a  tool  for developing  future  policies,  programs,  and  initiatives  aimed  at  enhancing maternal and child health.

![Picture 9](images/SRC013/picture-009.png)
Ȓɣɿɰ ȯɇȳɻ ȝɞȯ ɞɿɻɰɇɻɇɣɞȝɗ ɴɻȝɻɿɴ Ʉȝʊȳ ȝɞ ɇɝɭɣɰɻȝɞɻ ɰɣɗȳ ɇɞ ɇɞʠɿȳɞȩɇɞȿ ʑɣɿɰ ɰȳɭɰɣȯɿȩɻɇʊȳ ɄȳȝɗɻɄ ȝɞȯ Ⱦȳɰɻɇɗɇɻʑʲ Ǌɞȝȯȳɯɿȝɻȳ ɇɞɻȝɕȳ ɣȾ ȳɞȳɰȿʑ ȝɞȯ ɞɿɻɰɇȳɞɻɴ ˉɭɰɣɻȳɇɞʳ ȩȝɰȨɣɄʑȯɰȝɻȳɴʳ ȳɴɴȳɞɻɇȝɗ Ⱦȝɻɻʑ ȝȩɇȯɴʳ ʊɇɻȝɝɇɞɴ ɣɰ ɝɇɞȳɰȝɗɴˊ ɣɰ ȝɞ ɿɞȨȝɗȝɞȩȳȯ ȩɣɞɴɿɝɭɻɇɣɞ ɣȾ Ⱦɣɣȯɴ Ⱦɰɣɝ ɻɄȳ ɴɇʐ Ⱦɣɣȯ ȿɰɣɿɭɴ ˉɇʲȳʲ ɻɣɣ ɄɇȿɄ ɣɰ ɻɣɣ ɗɣʋˊʳ ɝȝʑ ȝʜȳȩɻ ɻɄȳ Ⱦɿɞȩɻɇɣɞ ɣȾ ɻɄȳ ɣʊȝɰɇȳɴ ȝɞȯ ɻɄɿɴ ɰȳȯɿȩȳ ʑɣɿɰ Ⱦȳɰɻɇɗɇɻʑ [4] . The ɝȝɇɞ Ⱦɣɣȯ ȿɰɣɿɭɴ ɇɞȩɗɿȯȳ ȋȳȿȳɻȝȨɗȳɴʳ ǁɰɿɇɻɴʳ Ƭȳɰȳȝɗɴ ȝɞȯ ɴɻȝɰȩɄʑ ʊȳȿȳɻȝȨɗȳɴʳ ǘȳȿɿɝȳɴʳ Ǟɇɗɕʳ ȯȝɇɰʑ ɭɰɣȯɿȩɻɴ ˞ ȝɗɻȳɰɞȝɻɇʊȳɴʳ ȝɞȯ ǁɇɴɄʳ ɭɣɿɗɻɰʑʳ ɝȳȝɻ ˞ ȝɗɻȳɰɞȝɻɇʊȳɴʲ
Ǌɞ ȝȯȯɇɻɇɣɞʳ ʑɣɿɰ Ȩɣȯʑ ʋȳɇȿɄɻ ɝȝʑ ȝʜȳȩɻ ʑɣɿɰ ȩɄȝɞȩȳɴ ɣȾ ȿȳɻɻɇɞȿ ɭɰȳȿɞȝɞɻʲ Ǌɞ Ⱦȝȩɻʳ ʋɣɝȳɞ ʋɄɣ ȝɰȳ ɣʊȳɰʋȳɇȿɄɻʳ ɣȨȳɴȳʳ ɣɰ ɿɞȯȳɰʋȳɇȿɄɻ  Ʉȝʊȳ ȝ ɄɇȿɄȳɰ ɰɇɴɕ ɣȾ Ʉɣɰɝɣɞȝɗ ȝɞȯ ɣʊȝɰɇȝɞ ɭɰɣȨɗȳɝɴʳ ʋɄɇȩɄ ɝȝʑ ɗȳȝȯ ɻɣ ɄɇȿɄȳɰ ɰɇɴɕɴ ɣȾ ɇɞȾȳɰɻɇɗɇɻʑʲ ǤʊȳɰʋȳɇȿɄɻʳ ɣȨȳɴȳʳ ȝɞȯ ɿɞȯȳɰʋȳɇȿɄɻ ʋɣɝȳɞ ɝȝʑ ɰȳɯɿɇɰȳ ȝ ɗɣɞȿȳɰ ɭȳɰɇɣȯ ɣȾ ɻɇɝȳ ɻɣ ȿȳɻ ɭɰȳȿɞȝɞɻʳ ȝɞȯ ɝȝʑ Ʉȝʊȳ ɄɇȿɄȳɰ ɰɇɴɕɴ ɣȾ ɝɇɴȩȝɰɰɇȝȿȳ [4] .
ǼɄȳɰȳȾɣɰȳʳ ɻɣ ɇɝɭɰɣʊȳ Ⱦȳɰɻɇɗɇɻʑ ȝɞȯ ɇɞȩɰȳȝɴȳ ʑɣɿɰ ȩɄȝɞȩȳɴ ɣȾ Ʉȝʊɇɞȿ ȝ ɄȳȝɗɻɄʑ ɭɰȳȿɞȝɞȩʑʳ ɝȝɕȳ ɴɿɰȳ  ɻɣ  ȝȩɄɇȳʊȳ  ȝɞȯ  ɝȝɇɞɻȝɇɞ  ȝ  ɄȳȝɗɻɄʑ  Ȩɣȯʑ  ʋȳɇȿɄɻ  ˉɴȳȩɻɇɣɞ  ̹ˊ  ȝɞȯ  ȝȯɣɭɻ  ȝɞ  ȝȯȳɯɿȝɻȳ  ȝɞȯ Ȩȝɗȝɞȩȳȯ ȯɇȳɻ  ˉɴȳȩɻɇɣɞ  ̺ʲ̷ˊʲ
![Picture 10](images/SRC013/picture-010.png)
![Picture 11](images/SRC013/picture-011.png)
ǂȳɴɻȝɻɇɣɞȝɗ  ƲɇȝȨȳɻȳɴ  Ǟȳɗɗɇɻɿɴ  ˉǂƲǞˊ  ɇɴ  ȩɿɰɰȳɞɻɗʑ  ɻɄȳ  ɝɣɴɻ  ȩɣɝɝɣɞ  ɝȳȯɇȩȝɗ  ɭɰȳȿɞȝɞȩʑ ȩɣɝɭɗɇȩȝɻɇɣɞʲ Ǌɞ ɻɄȳ ǵɻȝɻȳ ɣȾ ǰȝɻȝɰʳ ̸̺̉ ɣȾ ɭɰȳȿɞȝɞɻ ʋɣɝȳɞ ȝɰȳ ȯɇȝȿɞɣɴȳȯ ʋɇɻɄ ǂƲǞ [5] . While ɝɣɰȳ ɇɞȾɣɰɝȝɻɇɣɞ ȝȨɣɿɻ ǂƲǞ ɇɴ ɭɰȳɴȳɞɻȳȯ ɇɞ ȩɄȝɭɻȳɰ ̸ʳ ɻɄȳ ɭɰȳʊȳɞɻɇɣɞ ɣȾ ɇɻ ȩȝɞ ɴɻȝɰɻ ȳʊȳɞ ȨȳȾɣɰȳ  ȿȳɻɻɇɞȿ  ɭɰȳȿɞȝɞɻʲ
SRC013_CHUNK_4_1_0_0_0_0:
CHAPTER 1 DIET AND LIFESTYLE BEFORE PREGNANCY > Box 1. Tips to prevent GDM before pregnancy
## Box 1. Tips to prevent GDM before pregnancy
- Ǽɰʑ ɻɣ ɗɣɴȳ ʋȳɇȿɄɻ ɇȾ ʑɣɿ ȝɰȳ ɣʊȳɰʋȳɇȿɄɻ ɣɰ ɣȨȳɴȳ ˉɰȳȾȳɰ ɻɣ ɴȳȩɻɇɣɞ ̹ˊ
- Aim to consume an adequate, balanced and varied diet that is rich in vegetables, fruits, ʋɄɣɗȳ  ȿɰȝɇɞ  ȩȳɰȳȝɗɴʳ  ȝɞȯ  ɗȳȿɿɝȳɴʳ  ʋɇɻɄ  ȝȯȳɯɿȝɻȳ  ȝɝɣɿɞɻɴ  ɣȾ  ɗɣʋ˅Ⱦȝɻ  ɝɇɗɕ  ȝɞȯ  ȯȝɇɰʑ ɭɰɣȯɿȩɻɴʳ  ʟɴɄʳ  ɭɣɿɗɻɰʑʳ  ȝɞȯ  ɗȳȝɞ  ɝȳȝɻɴ  ˉɰȳȾȳɰ  ɻɣ  ɴȳȩɻɇɣɞ  ̺ʲ̷ˊ
- ǘɇɝɇɻ ʑɣɿɰ ɇɞɻȝɕȳ ɣȾ ɰȳʟɞȳȯ ȩȳɰȳȝɗ ɭɰɣȯɿȩɻɴ ˉɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ʋɄɇɻȳ Ȩɰȳȝȯʳ ʋɄɇɻȳ ɰɇȩȳʳ ȝɞȯ ʋɄɇɻȳ ɭȝɴɻȝˊʳ  ɄɇȿɄ˅Ⱦȝɻ  Ⱦɣɣȯɴʳ  ɴȝʊɣɰʑ  ɴɞȝȩɕɴʳ  ɴʋȳȳɻɴʳ  ȝɞȯ  ɴɿȿȝɰ˅ɴʋȳȳɻȳɞȳȯ Ȩȳʊȳɰȝȿȳɴ
- ƶɞȿȝȿȳ ɇɞ ɰȳȿɿɗȝɰ ɭɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ ȝȩɻɇʊɇɻʑ ˉɰȳȾȳɰ ɻɣ ɴȳȩɻɇɣɞ ̻ˊ
- Limit sitting time

CHAPTER 1 DIET AND LIFESTYLE BEFORE PREGNANCY > Box 1. Tips to prevent GDM before pregnancy > Achieving and Maintaining a Healthy Body Weight
### Achieving and Maintaining a Healthy Body Weight
Ǟȝɇɞɻȝɇɞɇɞȿ  ȝ  ɄȳȝɗɻɄʑ  Ȩɣȯʑ  ʋȳɇȿɄɻ  ȩȝɞ  ȯȳȩɰȳȝɴȳ  ʑɣɿɰ  ɰɇɴɕ  ɣȾ  ȯȳʊȳɗɣɭɇɞȿ  ɻʑɭȳ  ̸  ȯɇȝȨȳɻȳɴʳ ȩȝɰȯɇɣʊȝɴȩɿɗȝɰ  ȯɇɴȳȝɴȳɴʳ  Ʉʑɭȳɰɻȳɞɴɇɣɞʳ  ɒɣɇɞɻ  ɭɰɣȨɗȳɝɴʳ  ɰȳɴɭɇɰȝɻɣɰʑ  ȩɣɞȯɇɻɇɣɞɴʳ  ɴɗȳȳɭ  ȝɭɞȳȝʳ ȿȝɗɗȨɗȝȯȯȳɰ  ȯɇɴȳȝɴȳɴʳ  Ʉȳɰɞɇȝʳ  ɰȳɭɰɣȯɿȩɻɇʊȳ  ȯɇɴɣɰȯȳɰɴʳ  ȝɞȯ  ɴɣɝȳ  ɻʑɭȳɴ  ɣȾ  ȩȝɞȩȳɰʲ  Ǌɻ  ȩȝɞ  ȝɗɴɣ ɇɝɭɰɣʊȳ  ʑɣɿɰ  ɝȳɞɻȝɗ  ɄȳȝɗɻɄ  ȝɞȯ  ʋȳɗɗ˅Ȩȳɇɞȿʲ
ƫȳɇɞȿ ɣʊȳɰʋȳɇȿɄɻ ɣɰ ɣȨȳɴȳ ȩȝɞ ɇɞȩɰȳȝɴȳ ʑɣɿɰ ɰɇɴɕ ɣȾ ɝȝɒɣɰ ɄȳȝɗɻɄ ȩɣɝɭɗɇȩȝɻɇɣɞɴ ȯɿɰɇɞȿ ʑɣɿɰ ɭɰȳȿɞȝɞȩʑʳ ɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ǂƲǞʳ ȯȳɗɇʊȳɰʑ ȩɣɝɭɗɇȩȝɻɇɣɞɴ ˉɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ȳɝȳɰȿȳɞȩʑ Ƭ˅ɴȳȩɻɇɣɞˊʳ ɝȝɗȾɣɰɝȝɻɇɣɞɴ ɣȾ ɻɄȳ ȨȝȨʑʳ ɗɣʋ˅ȨɇɰɻɄ ʋȳɇȿɄɻ ȨȝȨɇȳɴ ˉʊȳɰʑ ɴɝȝɗɗ ȨȝȨɇȳɴˊʳ ɗȝɰȿȳ ȨȝȨɇȳɴʳ ɿɞɴɿȩȩȳɴɴȾɿɗ ȨɰȳȝɴɻȾȳȳȯɇɞȿ and even maternal death [1] ʲ Ǌɞ ȩɣɞɻɰȝɴɻʳ Ȩȳɇɞȿ ɿɞȯȳɰʋȳɇȿɄɻ ɇɞȩɰȳȝɴȳɴ ʑɣɿɰ ɰɇɴɕ ɣȾ Ʉȝʊɇɞȿ ɞɿɻɰɇȳɞɻ ȯȳʟȩɇȳɞȩɇȳɴʳ ȝɞȳɝɇȝ ȝɞȯ ɭɣɣɰ Ȩɣɞȳ ɄȳȝɗɻɄʳ ʋɄɇɗȳ ȝɗɴɣ ɇɞȩɰȳȝɴɇɞȿ ɻɄȳ ɰȝɻȳɴ ɣȾ ȩɣɝɭɗɇȩȝɻɇɣɞɴ ȯɿɰɇɞȿ ɭɰȳȿɞȝɞȩʑ ɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ɭɰȳɻȳɰɝ ȨɇɰɻɄɴ ˉȳȝɰɗʑ ȨɇɰɻɄɴˊʳ ȝɞȯ ɴɝȝɗɗ ɣɰ ɗɣʋ˅ȨɇɰɻɄ ʋȳɇȿɄɻ ȨȝȨɇȳɴ [6] .
ǼɄȳɰȳȾɣɰȳʳ ʑɣɿ ɴɄɣɿɗȯ ȝɇɝ ɻɣ ɰȳȝȩɄ ȝɞȯ ɝȝɇɞɻȝɇɞ ȝ ɞɣɰɝȝɗ Ȩɣȯʑ ʋȳɇȿɄɻ ɇɞ ɣɰȯȳɰ ɻɣ ȝȩɄɇȳʊȳ ɻɄȳ Ȩȳɴɻ ɄȳȝɗɻɄ ɣɿɻȩɣɝȳɴ Ⱦɣɰ ʑɣɿ ȝɞȯ ʑɣɿɰ ȨȝȨʑʲ Ȓɣɿɰ Ȩɣȯʑ ʋȳɇȿɄɻ ɴɻȝɻɿɴ ɇɴ ɿɴɿȝɗɗʑ ȝɴɴȳɴɴȳȯ Ȩʑ ȩȝɗȩɿɗȝɻɇɞȿ ʑɣɿɰ ƫɣȯʑ Ǟȝɴɴ Ǌɞȯȳʐ ˉƫǞǊˊ  ʋɄɇȩɄ ɇɴ ȝ ɝȳȝɴɿɰȳ ɣȾ ʋȳɇȿɄɻ ɰȳɗȝɻɇʊȳ ɻɣ ɄȳɇȿɄɻʲ Ǟȝɞʑ ɣɞɗɇɞȳ ȩȝɗȩɿɗȝɻɣɰɴ ȩȝɞ Ʉȳɗɭ ȯȳɻȳɰɝɇɞȳ ʑɣɿɰ ƫǞǊʲ Ơɗɻȳɰɞȝɻɇʊȳɗʑʳ ʑɣɿ ȩȝɞ Ⱦɣɗɗɣʋ ɿɭ ʋɇɻɄ ȝ ȯɇȳɻɇɻɇȝɞ ɻɣ ɗȳȝɰɞ ɝɣɰȳ ȝȨɣɿɻ ʑɣɿɰ ƫǞǊʲ ǼȝȨɗȳ ̷ ȝɞȯ ǁɇȿɿɰȳ ̷ ɴɄɣʋ ʑɣɿɰ ʋȳɇȿɄɻ ȩɗȝɴɴɇʟȩȝɻɇɣɞ ȝȩȩɣɰȯɇɞȿ to your BMI [7] ʲ Ǌɻ ɇɴ ɇɝɭɣɰɻȝɞɻ ɻɣ ɞɣɻȳ ɻɄȝɻ ɻɄɇɴ ƫǞǊ ȩɗȝɴɴɇʟȩȝɻɇɣɞ ɇɴ Ⱦɣɰ ȝȯɿɗɻɴ ȝɞȯ ɴɄɣɿɗȯ ɞɣɻ Ȩȳ ɿɴȳȯ Ⱦɣɰ ȩɄɇɗȯɰȳɞ ɣɰ ȝȯɣɗȳɴȩȳɞɻɴʲ Ǌɻ ɇɴ ȝɗɴɣ ɞɣɻ ȝɭɭɗɇȩȝȨɗȳ Ⱦɣɰ ɭɰȳȿɞȝɞɻ ʋɣɝȳɞ ɣɰ ȝɻɄɗȳɻȳɴʲ
ǼȝȨɗȳ ̷ʲ ȌȳɇȿɄɻ ȩɗȝɴɴɇʟȩȝɻɇɣɞ ȝȩȩɣɰȯɇɞȿ ɻɣ ƫǞǊ Ⱦɣɰ ȝȯɿɗɻ ɞɣɞ˅ɭɰȳȿɞȝɞɻ ʋɣɝȳɞ
| ƫǞǊ ˉɕȿʿɝ 2 ˊ   | ȌȳɇȿɄɻ ȩɗȝɴɴɇʟȩȝɻɇɣɞ   |
|-----------------|------------------------|
| < 18.5          | ȀɞȯȳɰʋȳɇȿɄɻ            |
| 18.5 - 24.9     | Normal                 |
| 25 - 29.9       | ǤʊȳɰʋȳɇȿɄɻ             |
| ˹ ̶̹              | Obese                  |

![Picture 14](images/SRC013/picture-014.png)
Ȓɣɿɰ  ɄȳȝɗɻɄȩȝɰȳ  ɭɰɣʊɇȯȳɰ  ɝȝʑ  ȝɗɴɣ  ɝȳȝɴɿɰȳ ʑɣɿɰ  ʋȝɇɴɻ  ȩɇɰȩɿɝȾȳɰȳɞȩȳʳ  ʋɄɇȩɄ  ɇɴ  ȝɞɣɻɄȳɰ ɄȳɗɭȾɿɗ ɻɣɣɗ ɻɣ ȝɴɴȳɴɴ ʑɣɿɰ ɄȳȝɗɻɄ ɰɇɴɕʲ ƠȨȯɣɝɇɞȝɗ  ˉɣɰ  ȩȳɞɻɰȝɗˊ  ɣȨȳɴɇɻʑ  ȩȝɞ  ɇɞȩɰȳȝɴȳ ʑɣɿɰ ɰɇɴɕ ɣȾ ɻʑɭȳ ̸ ȯɇȝȨȳɻȳɴ ȝɞȯ ȩȝɰȯɇɣʊȝɴȩɿɗȝɰ ȯɇɴȳȝɴȳɴʲ  Ơȩȩɣɰȯɇɞȿ  ɻɣ  ɻɄȳ  ȌǇǤʳ  ʋɣɝȳɞ˔ɴ ʋȝɇɴɻ ɴɄɣɿɗȯ Ȩȳ ɞɣ ɝɣɰȳ ɻɄȝɞ ̾̾ ȩɝʲ Ǥɭɻɇɝȝɗ ɰȳȩɣɝɝȳɞȯȝɻɇɣɞɴ ȝɰȳ ɴɝȝɗɗȳɰ ˆ ɞɣ ɝɣɰȳ ɻɄȝɞ ̶̾ ȩɝ Ⱦɣɰ ʋɣɝȳɞ [8] .

CHAPTER 1 DIET AND LIFESTYLE BEFORE PREGNANCY > Box 1. Tips to prevent GDM before pregnancy > Achieving and Maintaining a Healthy Body Weight > ǊȾ ʑɣɿ Ʉȝʊȳ ȝ ɞɣɰɝȝɗ ʋȳɇȿɄɻ
#### ǊȾ ʑɣɿ Ʉȝʊȳ ȝ ɞɣɰɝȝɗ ʋȳɇȿɄɻ
- ǁɣɗɗɣʋ ȝɞ ȝȯȳɯɿȝɻȳ ȝɞȯ Ȩȝɗȝɞȩȳȯ ȯɇȳɻ ʋɇɻɄ ȝ ʊȝɰɇȳɻʑ ɣȾ Ⱦɣɣȯɴ Ⱦɰɣɝ ɻɄȳ ɝȝɇɞ Ⱦɣɣȯ ȿɰɣɿɭɴ ˉɰȳȾȳɰ ɻɣ ɴȳȩɻɇɣɞ ̺ʲ̷ˊʲ
- Ʋɣ ɞɣɻ ɴɕɇɭ ɝȳȝɗɴʲ Ơɇɝ Ⱦɣɰ ̹ ɝȳȝɗɴ ȯȝɇɗʑ ȝɞȯ ̸ ɄȳȝɗɻɄʑ ɴɞȝȩɕɴ ˉɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ȾɰȳɴɄ ʊȳȿȳɻȝȨɗȳɴ ȝɞȯ Ⱦɰɿɇɻɴˊʲ
- Ơɇɝ ɻɣ ȯɰɇɞɕ ̾˅̷̸ ȩɿɭɴ ɣȾ ʠɿɇȯɴ ɭȳɰ ȯȝʑ ɇɞȩɗɿȯɇɞȿ ʋȝɻȳɰ ˉɇʲȳʲ ̸ ˅ ̹ ǘˊ [9] .
- ƬɄɣɣɴȳ ʋȝɻȳɰ ɣʊȳɰ ɴɿȿȝɰ˅ɴʋȳȳɻȳɞȳȯ Ȩȳʊȳɰȝȿȳɴ ȝɴ ɻɄȳʑ ȝɰȳ ɄɇȿɄ ɇɞ ȩȝɗɣɰɇȳɴ ȝɞȯ ɴɿȿȝɰʲ
- Ʋɰɇɞɕ ɝɣɰȳ ʋȝɻȳɰ ʋɄȳɞ ʑɣɿ ȝɰȳ ȳʐȳɰȩɇɴɇɞȿ ȝɞȯ ȯɿɰɇɞȿ Ʉɣɻ ʋȳȝɻɄȳɰʲ
- ƫȳ ɭɄʑɴɇȩȝɗɗʑ ȝȩɻɇʊȳ ȯȝɇɗʑ ȝɞȯ ɰȳȯɿȩȳ ʑɣɿɰ ɴɇɻɻɇɞȿ ɻɇɝȳ ˉɰȳȾȳɰ ɻɣ ɴȳȩɻɇɣɞ ̻ˊʲ

#### ǊȾ ʑɣɿ ȝɰȳ ɣʊȳɰʋȳɇȿɄɻ ɣɰ ɣȨȳɴȳ
- ǵȳȳ ȝ ȯɇȳɻɇɻɇȝɞ ɇȾ ʑɣɿ ɞȳȳȯ ɻɣ ɗɣɴȳ ʋȳɇȿɄɻʲ
- Ơɇɝ Ⱦɣɰ ȝ ɄȳȝɗɻɄʑ Ȩɣȯʑ ʋȳɇȿɄɻ ˉɇʲȳʲʳ ȝ ƫǞǊ Ⱦȝɗɗɇɞȿ ʋɇɻɄɇɞ ɻɄȳ ɞɣɰɝȝɗ ɰȝɞȿȳ ȝɴ ɴɄɣʋɞ ɇɞ ǼȝȨɗȳ ̷ ȝɞȯ ǁɇȿɿɰȳ ̷ˊʲ
- ǁɣɗɗɣʋ ȝɞ ȝȯȳɯɿȝɻȳ ȝɞȯ Ȩȝɗȝɞȩȳȯ ȯɇȳɻ ʋɇɻɄ ȝ ʊȝɰɇȳɻʑ ɣȾ Ⱦɣɣȯɴ Ⱦɰɣɝ ɻɄȳ ɴɇʐ Ⱦɣɣȯ ȿɰɣɿɭɴ ˉɰȳȾȳɰ ɻɣ ɴȳȩɻɇɣɞ ̺ʲ̷ˊʲ
- Ǯȝʑ ȩɗɣɴȳ ȝɻɻȳɞɻɇɣɞ ɻɣ ʑɣɿɰ ɭɣɰɻɇɣɞ ɴɇʗȳɴ ɻɣ ȩɣɞɻɰɣɗ ȩȝɗɣɰɇȩ ɇɞɻȝɕȳʲ
- ǘɇɝɇɻ ʑɣɿɰ ȩɣɞɴɿɝɭɻɇɣɞ ɣȾ Ⱦɣɣȯɴ ɄɇȿɄ ɇɞ ȳɞȳɰȿʑ ˉȩȝɗɣɰɇȳɴˊʳ ɴɿȿȝɰʳ ȝɞȯ ɿɞɄȳȝɗɻɄʑ Ⱦȝɻɴ ˉɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ɻɰȝȯɇɻɇɣɞȝɗ ɴʋȳȳɻɴʳ ȯȳɴɴȳɰɻɴʳ ȩȝɕȳɴʳ ɭȝɴɻɰɇȳɴʳ ȩɄɣȩɣɗȝɻȳɴʳ Ⱦɰɇȳȯ ȝɞȯ Ⱦȝɴɻ Ⱦɣɣȯɴˊʲ
- ǁȝʊɣɰ ɻɄȳ ȩɣɞɴɿɝɭɻɇɣɞ ɣȾ Ⱦɣɣȯɴ ɰɇȩɄ ɇɞ ɞɿɻɰɇȳɞɻɴ ȝɞȯ ʟȨȳɰ ˉʊȳȿȳɻȝȨɗȳɴʳ Ⱦɰɿɇɻɴʳ ʋɄɣɗȳ ȿɰȝɇɞ ȩȳɰȳȝɗɴʳ ɗȳȿɿɝȳɴʳ ɗɣʋ˅Ⱦȝɻ ɝɇɗɕ ȝɞȯ ȯȝɇɰʑ ɭɰɣȯɿȩɻɴʳ ʟɴɄʳ ɭɣɿɗɻɰʑʳ ɗȳȝɞ ɝȳȝɻɴʳ ȝɞȯ ɿɞɴȝɗɻȳȯʳ ɰȝʋ ɞɿɻɴ ȝɞȯ ɴȳȳȯɴˊʲ
- Ơɇɝ ɻɣ ȯɰɇɞɕ ̾˅̷̸ ȩɿɭɴ ɣȾ ʠɿɇȯɴ ɭȳɰ ȯȝʑ ɇɞȩɗɿȯɇɞȿ ʋȝɻȳɰ ˉɇʲȳʲ ̸ ˅ ̹ ǘˊ [9] .
- ƬɄɣɣɴȳ ʋȝɻȳɰ ɣʊȳɰ ɴɿȿȝɰ˅ɴʋȳȳɻȳɞȳȯ Ȩȳʊȳɰȝȿȳɴ ȝɴ ɻɄȳʑ ȝɰȳ ɄɇȿɄ ɇɞ ȩȝɗɣɰɇȳɴ ȝɞȯ ɴɿȿȝɰʲ
- ǘɇɝɇɻ  ȝȯȯɇɞȿ  ɴɿȿȝɰ  ʋɄɇɗȳ  ɭɰȳɭȝɰɇɞȿ  ʑɣɿɰ  Ⱦɣɣȯʵ  ɇɞɴɻȳȝȯ  ɿɴȳ  ɴɣɝȳ  ȾɰȳɴɄɗʑ  ȩɿɻ  Ⱦɰɿɇɻɴʳ  ɣɰ ȩɇɞɞȝɝɣɞ  ɻɣ  ȳɞɄȝɞȩȳ  ɻɄȳ  ʠȝʊɣɰʲ
- ƫȳ ȝɴ ɭɄʑɴɇȩȝɗɗʑ ȝȩɻɇʊȳ ȝɴ ʑɣɿ ȩȝɞ Ȩȳʲ ƶɞȿȝȿȳ ɇɞ ɝɣȯȳɰȝɻȳ ɻɣ ʊɇȿɣɰɣɿɴ˅ɇɞɻȳɞɴɇɻʑ ɭɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ ȝȩɻɇʊɇɻʑ ɣɞ ɝɣɴɻ ȯȝʑɴ ˉ̺̻˅̶̼ ɝɇɞɿɻȳɴʳ ̻ ȯȝʑɴʿʋȳȳɕˊʲ ƫɿɇɗȯ ɿɭ ȿɰȝȯɿȝɗɗʑ ȝɞȯ ȩɄɣɣɴȳ ɗɣʋ˅ ɇɝɭȝȩɻ ȳʐȳɰȩɇɴȳɴ ɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ȩʑȩɗɇɞȿʳ ɴʋɇɝɝɇɞȿ ɣɰ ʋȝɗɕɇɞȿ ˍ̷̶ˎ ˉɰȳȾȳɰ ɻɣ ɴȳȩɻɇɣɞ ̻ˊʲ
- Ǽȝɗɕ ɻɣ ȝ ȯɣȩɻɣɰ ɣɰ ȝ ȯɇȳɻɇɻɇȝɞ ɇȾ ʑɣɿ Ʉȝʊȳ ȩɣɞȩȳɰɞɴ ȝȨɣɿɻ ʑɣɿɰ ʋȳɇȿɄɻʲ

#### ǊȾ ʑɣɿ ȝɰȳ ɿɞȯȳɰʋȳɇȿɄɻ
- Ơɇɝ Ⱦɣɰ ȝ ɄȳȝɗɻɄʑ Ȩɣȯʑ ʋȳɇȿɄɻ ˉɰȳȾȳɰ ɻɣ Ǽ ȝȨɗȳ ̷ ȝɞȯ ǁɇȿɿɰȳ ̷ˊʲ
- ǁɣɗɗɣʋ ȝɞ ȝȯȳɯɿȝɻȳ ȝɞȯ Ȩȝɗȝɞȩȳȯ ȯɇȳɻ ʋɇɻɄ ȝ ʊȝɰɇȳɻʑ ɣȾ Ⱦɣɣȯɴ Ⱦɰɣɝ ɻɄȳ ̼ Ⱦɣɣȯ ȿɰɣɿɭɴ ˉɰȳȾȳɰ  ɻɣ  ɴȳȩɻɇɣɞ  ̺ʲ̷ˊʲ
- ǊȾ ʑɣɿ Ʉȝʊȳ ȝ ɴɝȝɗɗ ȝɭɭȳɻɇɻȳʳ ȳȝɻ ʟʊȳ ɻɣ ɴɇʐ ɴɝȝɗɗ ɝȳȝɗɴ ȝ ȯȝʑʲ
- Ʋɰɇɞɕ ʠɿɇȯɴ ȨȳȾɣɰȳ ȝɞȯ ȝȾɻȳɰ ɝȳȝɗɴʳ Ȩɿɻ ɞɣɻ ʋɇɻɄ ɻɄȳɝʲ ǼɄɇɴ Ʉȳɗɭɴ ɗȳȝʊȳ ɝɣɰȳ ɭɗȝȩȳ Ⱦɣɰ food.
- Ǌɞȩɰȳȝɴȳ ʑɣɿɰ ȩȝɗɣɰɇȩ ɇɞɻȝɕȳ Ȩʑ Ⱦɣɗɗɣʋɇɞȿ ɻɄȳ Ȩȳɗɣʋ ɻɇɭɴʴ
- Ǽɣɭ ʑɣɿɰ ɿɴɿȝɗ ɝȳȝɗɴ ȝɞȯ ɴȝɗȝȯɴ ʋɇɻɄ ɴɣɝȳ Ⱦɣɣȯ ɇɞȿɰȳȯɇȳɞɻɴ ɻɄȝɻ ȝɰȳ ɰɇȩɄ ɇɞ ɞɿɻɰɇȳɞɻɴ ȝɞȯ ȩȝɗɣɰɇȳɴʳ ɗɇɕȳ ȿɰȝɻȳȯ ȩɄȳȳɴȳʲ
- Ơȯȯ ɭɣʋȯȳɰȳȯ ɝɇɗɕʳ ɝȝɰȿȝɰɇɞȳʳ Ʉɣɞȳʑʳ ȯɰɇȳȯ Ⱦɰɿɇɻɴ ȝɞȯʿɣɰ ɿɞɴȝɗɻȳȯʳ ɰȝʋ ɞɿɻɴ ɻɣ ʑɣɿɰ ȩɣɣɕȳȯ ɝȳȝɗɴʲ
- ǂȝɰɞɇɴɄ ɴȝɗȝȯɴ ʋɇɻɄ ɄȳȝɗɻɄʑ ɣɇɗɴ ɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ɣɗɇʊȳ ɣɇɗʳ ʋɄɣɗȳ ɣɗɇʊȳɴʳ ȝʊɣȩȝȯɣɴʳ ɿɞɴȝɗɻȳȯʳ ɰȝʋ nuts and seeds.
- ǼɄɇȩɕȳɞ ɿɭ ɴɣɿɭɴʳ ȩȝɴɴȳɰɣɗȳɴʳ ɝȝɴɄȳȯ ɭɣɻȝɻɣȳɴʳ ȝɞȯ ɗɇɯɿɇȯ ɝɇɗɕ ʋɇɻɄ ̷ ɻɣ ̸ ɻȝȨɗȳɴɭɣɣɞɴ ɣȾ ȯɰʑ ɝɇɗɕ ɭɣʋȯȳɰʲ
- Ǉȝʊȳ ɞɿɻɰɇɻɇɣɿɴ ɴɞȝȩɕɴ ˉȾɰȳɴɄ Ⱦɰɿɇɻɴʳ ʑɣȿɿɰɻʳ ɿɞɴȝɗɻȳȯʳ ɰȝʋ ɞɿɻɴ ȝɞȯ ɴȳȳȯɴˊʲ
- Ǯɰȳɭȝɰȳ Ʉɣɝȳɝȝȯȳ ɴɄȝɕȳɴ ʋɇɻɄ Ⱦɿɗɗ˅Ⱦȝɻ ɝɇɗɕ ȝɞȯ ȾɰȳɴɄ Ⱦɰɿɇɻɴʲ Ơȯȯ ɴɣɝȳ ɿɞɴȝɗɻȳȯʳ ɰȝʋ nuts or honey to increase the number of calories.
- Ǯɰȳɭȝɰȳ Ʉɣɻ ɣȝɻɝȳȝɗ ɣɰ ɣɻɄȳɰ ȩȳɰȳȝɗɴ ʋɇɻɄ Ⱦɿɗɗ˅Ⱦȝɻ ɝɇɗɕʳ ɇɞɴɻȳȝȯ ɣȾ ʋȝɻȳɰʲ
- Ǽȝɗɕ ɻɣ ȝ ȯɣȩɻɣɰ ɣɰ ȝ ȯɇȳɻɇɻɇȝɞ ɇȾ ʑɣɿ Ʉȝʊȳ ȩɣɞȩȳɰɞɴ ȝȨɣɿɻ ʑɣɿɰ ʋȳɇȿɄɻʲ

CHAPTER 1 DIET AND LIFESTYLE BEFORE PREGNANCY > Dietary Recommendations During the Pre-Pregnancy Period
## Dietary Recommendations During the Pre-Pregnancy Period
Ȓɣɿɰ ȯɇȳɻȝɰʑ ɄȝȨɇɻɴ ȨȳȾɣɰȳ ɭɰȳȿɞȝɞȩʑ ȩȝɞ ȝʜȳȩɻ ʑɣɿɰ ɄȳȝɗɻɄ ȝɞȯ ʑɣɿɰ ȝȨɇɗɇɻʑ ɻɣ ȿȳɻ ɭɰȳȿɞȝɞɻ ȝɞȯ ɝȳȳɻ ɻɄȳ ɞɿɻɰɇȳɞɻ ȯȳɝȝɞȯɴ ɣȾ ɭɰȳȿɞȝɞȩʑʲ ǼɄɇɴ ɇɴ Ȩȳȩȝɿɴȳ ʑɣɿɰ ȯɇȳɻ ȯɇɰȳȩɻɗʑ ȝʜȳȩɻɴ ʑɣɿɰ Ȩɣȯʑ ʋȳɇȿɄɻ ȝɞȯ ɣɻɄȳɰ ɞɿɻɰɇɻɇɣɞȝɗ Ⱦȝȩɻɣɰɴʳ ɇɞȩɗɿȯɇɞȿ ɝɇȩɰɣɞɿɻɰɇȳɞɻ ȯȳʟȩɇȳɞȩɇȳɴʲ Ȍɣɝȳɞ ɝȝʑ Ȩȳ ȝɻ ȝ ɄɇȿɄȳɰ ɰɇɴɕ ɣȾ ɝɇȩɰɣɞɿɻɰɇȳɞɻ ȯȳʟȩɇȳɞȩɇȳɴ Ȩȳȩȝɿɴȳ ɣȾ ɝȳɞɴɻɰɿȝɻɇɣɞ ȝɞȯ ɻɄȳ ɄɇȿɄ ɝȳɻȝȨɣɗɇȩ ȯȳɝȝɞȯɴ ɣȾ ɭɰȳȿɞȝɞȩʑ [ 11] .
SRC013_CHUNK_4_2_1_0_0_0:
CHAPTER 1 DIET AND LIFESTYLE BEFORE PREGNANCY > Dietary Recommendations During the Pre-Pregnancy Period > 4.1. Adequate and balanced diet
### 4.1. Adequate and balanced diet
Ȓɣɿ ȩȝɞ ȝȩɄɇȳʊȳ ȝɞ ȝȯȳɯɿȝɻȳ ȝɞȯ Ȩȝɗȝɞȩȳȯ ȯɇȳɻ Ȩʑ Ⱦɣɗɗɣʋɇɞȿ ɻɄȳ ɰȳȩɣɝɝȳɞȯȝɻɇɣɞɴ ɣȾ ɻɄȳ ǰȝɻȝɰ Ʋɇȳɻȝɰʑ ǂɿɇȯȳɗɇɞȳɴ ȝɞȯ ȩɣɞɴɿɝɇɞȿ ȝ ʊȝɰɇȳɻʑ ɣȾ Ⱦɣɣȯɴ Ⱦɰɣɝ ɻɄȳ ɴɇʐ Ⱦɣɣȯ ȿɰɣɿɭɴ [12] ˉɰȳȾȳɰ ɻɣ ƫɣʐ ̹ˊʲ  ǼɄȳ  ǰȝɻȝɰ  Ʋɇȳɻȝɰʑ  ǂɿɇȯȳɗɇɞȳɴ  ɄɇȿɄɗɇȿɄɻ  ɻɄȳ  ɇɝɭɣɰɻȝɞȩȳ  ɣȾ  ȩɣɞɴɿɝɇɞȿ  ɭɗȝɞɻ˅Ȩȝɴȳȯ  Ⱦɣɣȯɴ ˉʊȳȿȳɻȝȨɗȳɴʳ Ⱦɰɿɇɻɴʳ ʋɄɣɗȳ ȿɰȝɇɞ ȩȳɰȳȝɗɴ ȝɞȯ ɗȳȿɿɝȳɴˊ ȯȝɇɗʑ ȝɴ ɻɄȳɴȳ Ⱦɣɣȯɴ ȩɣɞɻɰɇȨɿɻȳ ɻɣ Ȩȳɻɻȳɰ ɣʊȳɰȝɗɗ ɄȳȝɗɻɄ ȝɞȯ ʋȳɗɗ˅Ȩȳɇɞȿʲ ǼɄȳ ȿɿɇȯȳɗɇɞȳɴ ȝɗɴɣ ɰȳȩɣɝɝȳɞȯ ȝ ȯȝɇɗʑ ȩɣɞɴɿɝɭɻɇɣɞ ɣȾ ɗɣʋ˅Ⱦȝɻ ɝɇɗɕ ȝɞȯ ȯȝɇɰʑ ɭɰɣȯɿȩɻɴ ɻɣ ɝȝɇɞɻȝɇɞ ȝȯȳɯɿȝɻȳ ɇɞɻȝɕȳ ɣȾ ȩȝɗȩɇɿɝ ȝɞȯ ɣɻɄȳɰ ɞɿɻɰɇȳɞɻɴʲ ǁɇɴɄʳ ɭɣɿɗɻɰʑʳ ȝɞȯ ɗȳȝɞ ɝȳȝɻ ȝɗɴɣ ȩɣɞɻɰɇȨɿɻȳ ɻɣ ȝ ɄȳȝɗɻɄʑ ȯɇȳɻʳ ʋɄȳɞ ȳȝɻȳɞ ɇɞ ɝɣȯȳɰȝɻɇɣɞʲ
Ǽɣ ȝȩɄɇȳʊȳ ȝ ɄȳȝɗɻɄʑ ȝɞȯ Ȩȝɗȝɞȩȳȯ ȯɇȳɻʳ ɇɻ ɇɴ ɰȳȩɣɝɝȳɞȯȳȯ ɻɄȝɻ ʑɣɿ ɰȳȯɿȩȳ ʑɣɿɰ ɇɞɻȝɕȳɴ ɣȾ ɰȳʟɞȳȯ ȩȳɰȳȝɗ ɭɰɣȯɿȩɻɴ ˉɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ʋɄɇɻȳ Ȩɰȳȝȯʳ ʋɄɇɻȳ ɰɇȩȳ ȝɞȯ ʋɄɇɻȳ ɭȝɴɻȝˊʳ Ⱦɣɣȯɴ ɄɇȿɄ ɇɞ ɴȝɗɻʳ ɴɿȿȝɰ ȝɞȯ ɿɞɄȳȝɗɻɄʑ Ⱦȝɻɴʳ ɴȝʊɣɰʑ ɴɞȝȩɕɴʳ ɴʋȳȳɻɴʳ ȝɞȯ ɴɿȿȝɰ˅ɴʋȳȳɻȳɞȳȯ Ȩȳʊȳɰȝȿȳɴ [13, 14] .
Ơ ȯɇȳɻɇɻɇȝɞ ʋɇɗɗ Ʉȳɗɭ ʑɣɿ ɇȯȳɞɻɇȾʑ ɻɄȳ ȝɝɣɿɞɻ ɣȾ ȳɞȳɰȿʑ ˉȩȝɗɣɰɇȳɴˊ ɴɿɇɻȝȨɗȳ Ⱦɣɰ ʑɣɿ ȝɞȯ ɻɄȳ ȝɝɣɿɞɻɴ ɣȾ Ⱦɣɣȯ ʑɣɿ ȩȝɞ ȩɣɞɴɿɝȳ Ⱦɰɣɝ ȳȝȩɄ Ⱦɣɣȯ ȿɰɣɿɭʲ ǼɄȳ ȝɝɣɿɞɻ ɣȾ ȳɞȳɰȿʑ ˉȩȝɗɣɰɇȳɴˊ ʑɣɿ ȩȝɞ ɻȝɕȳ ʋɇɗɗ ȯȳɭȳɞȯ ɣɞ ʑɣɿɰ ȝȿȳʳ ȝɞȯ ʑɣɿɰ ȯȝɇɗʑ ɗȳʊȳɗ ɣȾ ɭɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ ȝȩɻɇʊɇɻʑʲ Ǌɻ ʋɇɗɗ ȝɗɴɣ ȯȳɭȳɞȯ ɣɞ ʋɄȳɻɄȳɰ ʑɣɿ ɞȳȳȯ ɻɣ ɗɣɴȳʳ ȿȝɇɞʳ ɣɰ ɝȝɇɞɻȝɇɞ ʑɣɿɰ ʋȳɇȿɄɻʲ
![Picture 20](images/SRC013/picture-020.png)
ƫɣʐ ̹ ɭɰɣʊɇȯȳɴ ʑɣɿ ʋɇɻɄ ɴɣɝȳ ȿȳɞȳɰȝɗ ɰȳȩɣɝɝȳɞȯȝɻɇɣɞɴʳ ȳʐȝɝɭɗȳɴ ɣȾ ʋɄȝɻ ɣɞȳ ɴȳɰʊɇɞȿ ɗɣɣɕɴ ɗɇɕȳʳ ȝɞȯ ɭɰȝȩɻɇȩȝɗ ɻɇɭɴ ɣɞ ȝȩɄɇȳʊɇɞȿ ȝɞ ȝȯȳɯɿȝɻȳ ȝɞȯ Ȩȝɗȝɞȩȳȯ ȯɇȳɻ [14] ʳ Ȩɿɻ ɝȝɕȳ ɴɿɰȳ ɻɣ ȩɣɞɴɿɗɻ ʋɇɻɄ ȝ ȯɇȳɻɇɻɇȝɞ Ⱦɣɰ ȾɿɰɻɄȳɰ ɻȝɇɗɣɰɇɞȿ ɻɣ ʑɣɿɰ ɴɭȳȩɇʟȩ ɞȳȳȯɴʲ

SRC013_CHUNK_4_2_1_1_1_1:
CHAPTER 1 DIET AND LIFESTYLE BEFORE PREGNANCY > Dietary Recommendations During the Pre-Pregnancy Period > 4.1. Adequate and balanced diet > Box 3. General recommendations, serving examples and practical tips for an adequate and balanced diet > VEGETABLES > ƶʐȝɝɭɗȳɴ ɣȾ ɣɞȳ ɴȳɰʊɇɞȿ ɣȾ ʊȳȿȳɻȝȨɗȳʴ
###### ƶʐȝɝɭɗȳɴ ɣȾ ɣɞȳ ɴȳɰʊɇɞȿ ɣȾ ʊȳȿȳɻȝȨɗȳʴ
- 1 large carrot
- 1 medium tomato
- ́ ȩɿɭ ɣȾ ȩɣɣɕȳȯ ȿɰȳȳɞ ɣɰ ȩɣɗɣɰȳȯ ʊȳȿȳɻȝȨɗȳɴ ˉȩȝȨȨȝȿȳʳ Ȩɰɣȩȩɣɗɇʳ ȳȿȿɭɗȝɞɻˊ
- ̷ ȩɿɭ ɣȾ ɰȝʋ ȿɰȳȳɞ ɗȳȝȾʑ ʊȳȿȳɻȝȨɗȳɴ ˉɗȳɻɻɿȩȳʳ ɴɭɇɞȝȩɄʳ ȝɰɿȿɿɗȝʳ ɭɿɰɴɗȝɞȳˊ
- ́ ȩɿɭ ̷̶̶̉ ʊȳȿȳɻȝȨɗȳ ɒɿɇȩȳʳ ɗɣʋ ɴɣȯɇɿɝ
SRC013_CHUNK_4_2_1_1_1_2:
CHAPTER 1 DIET AND LIFESTYLE BEFORE PREGNANCY > Dietary Recommendations During the Pre-Pregnancy Period > 4.1. Adequate and balanced diet > Box 3. General recommendations, serving examples and practical tips for an adequate and balanced diet > VEGETABLES > Ǯɰȝȩɻɇȩȝɗ ɻɇɭɴʴ
###### Ǯɰȝȩɻɇȩȝɗ ɻɇɭɴʴ
- ƬɄɣɣɴȳ ȝ ʋɇȯȳ ʊȝɰɇȳɻʑ ȝɞȯ ȩɣɗɣɰ ɣȾ ʊȳȿȳɻȝȨɗȳɴʲ
- ƶȝɻ ʊȳȿȳɻȝȨɗȳɴ ʋɇɻɄ ɝɣɴɻ ɝȳȝɗɴʳ ɇɞȩɗɿȯɇɞȿ ɴɞȝȩɕɴʲ
- Favor fresh vegetables in season.
- ƬɄɣɣɴȳ ʊȳȿȳɻȝȨɗȳɴ ɭɰȳɭȝɰȳȯ ʋɇɻɄ ɗɇɻɻɗȳ ɣɰ ɞɣ ȝȯȯȳȯ ɴȝɗɻʳ ɣɇɗ ɣɰ Ⱦȝɻʲ
- ƶȝɻ ȝȯȳɯɿȝɻȳ ȝɝɣɿɞɻɴ ȯȝɇɗʑ ɴɇɞȩȳ ʊȳȿȳɻȝȨɗȳɴ Ʉȳɗɭ ʑɣɿ Ⱦȳȳɗ Ⱦɿɗɗ ȝɞȯ ȝɰȳ ɗɣʋ ɇɞ ȩȝɗɣɰɇȳɴʲ
- Ƭɣɣɕ  ɴɇȯȳ  ʊȳȿȳɻȝȨɗȳɴ  ˉȨɰɣȩȩɣɗɇʳ  ȩȝɰɰɣɻɴʳ  ʗɿȩȩɄɇɞɇˊ  Ȩʑ  ɗɇȿɄɻɗʑ  ɴɻȳȝɝɇɞȿ  ɣɰ  ɴɻɇɰ˅Ⱦɰʑɇɞȿ  ɻɣ  ɭɰȳɴȳɰʊȳ nutrients.
- ƶȝɻ  ɝɣɰȳ  ȿɰȳȳɞɴ  ȝɞȯ  ɗȳȝȾʑ  ʊȳȿȳɻȝȨɗȳɴ  ˉȾȝɻɻɣɿȩɄʳ  ɻȝȨȨɣɿɗȳɄʳ  ȿɰȳȳɞ  ɻɄʑɝȳʳ  ȝɰɿȿɿɗȝʳ  ȩȝȨȨȝȿȳʳ  ɣɰ ɴɭɇɞȝȩɄ  ɴȝɗȝȯˊʲ
- Ǌɞ ɰȳɴɻȝɿɰȝɞɻɴʳ ɣɰȯȳɰ ɴȝɗȝȯ ȯɰȳɴɴɇɞȿ ɴȳɭȝɰȝɻȳɗʑ ȝɞȯ ɗɇɝɇɻ Ʉɣʋ ɝɿȩɄ ʑɣɿ ȝȯȯʲ
- ƶȝɻ ɰȝʋ ʊȳȿȳɻȝȨɗȳɴ ȝɴ ɴɞȝȩɕɴ ʋɇɻɄ ɗɣʋ˅Ⱦȝɻ ȯɇɭʲ
- ƶɞɒɣʑ ȿɰɇɗɗȳȯ ʊȳȿȳɻȝȨɗȳɴ ˉɻɣɝȝɻɣȳɴʳ ɣɞɇɣɞɴʳ ɝɿɴɄɰɣɣɝɴʳ ȿɰȳȳɞ ɭȳɭɭȳɰɴˊʲ
- ƶȝɻ ɝɣɰȳ ʊȳȿȳɻȝȨɗȳ˅Ȩȝɴȳȯ ȯɇɴɄȳɴ ɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ɴȝɗɣɣɞȝ ˉɻɰȝȯɇɻɇɣɞȝɗ ɴɻȳʋˊʲ
- ȌɄȳɞ ȳȝɻɇɞȿ ɣɿɻʳ ȩɄɣɣɴȳ ɭɗȝɇɞ ʊȳȿȳɻȝȨɗȳɴ ɇɞɴɻȳȝȯ ɣȾ Ȩɰȳȝȯȳȯ ɣɰ ȯȳȳɭ Ⱦɰɇȳȯʲ
- Ơʊɣɇȯ ȝȯȯɇɞȿ Ȩɿɻɻȳɰ ɣɰ ɝȝɰȿȝɰɇɞȳ ȝɞȯ ɰɇȩɄ ɴȝɿȩȳɴ ɻɣ ʊȳȿȳɻȝȨɗȳɴʲ Ȁɴȳ ȾɰȳɴɄ ɣɰ ȯɰɇȳȯ ɴɭɇȩȳɴʳ ɄȳɰȨɴʳ ɣɰ lemon juice instead.
- ǁȝʊɣɰ ȾɰȳɴɄ ʊȳȿȳɻȝȨɗȳɴ ɣʊȳɰ ȩȝɞɞȳȯ ɣɞȳɴʲ ȌɄȳɞ ȩɄɣɣɴɇɞȿ ȩȝɞɞȳȯ ʊȳȿȳɻȝȨɗȳɴʳ ɝȝɕȳ ɴɿɰȳ ɻɣ ɰɇɞɴȳ ɻɄȳɝ ʋɇɻɄ ʋȝɻȳɰ ɻɣ ɗɣʋȳɰ ɻɄȳ ɴȝɗɻ ȩɣɞɻȳɞɻʲ
- Ơȯȯ ȝ ɭɗȝɻȳ ɣȾ ȾɰȳɴɄ ȩɿɻ ʊȳȿȳɻȝȨɗȳɴ ʋɇɻɄ ʑɣɿɰ ɝȝɇɞ ɝȳȝɗɴʲ

###### ƶʐȝɝɭɗȳ ɣȾ ɣɞȳ ɴȳɰʊɇɞȿ [15] :
- ́ ȩɿɭ ɣȾ ȩɣɣɕȳȯ Ȩɰɣʋɞ ɰɇȩȳ ɣɰ ɭȝɴɻȝ
- ́ ȩɿɭ ɣȾ ȩɣɣɕȳȯ Ȩɿɗȿɿɰʳ ɣȝɻɴʳ Ʉȝɰȳȳɴ ʋɄȳȝɻʳ ɯɿɇɞɣȝ ɣɰ ȨɿȩɕʋɄȳȝɻ
- ̷ ɝȳȯɇɿɝ ɴɗɇȩȳ ɣȾ ʋɄɣɗȳ ȿɰȝɇɞ Ȩɰȳȝȯ
- ̷ ȩɿɭ ɣȾ ʋɄɣɗȳ ȿɰȝɇɞ ȩɣɰɞʠȝɕȳɴ
- ̹ ȩɿɭɴ ɣȾ ɿɞɴȝɗɻȳȯʳ ɭɗȝɇɞ ɭɣɭȩɣɰɞ
- ́ ɝȳȯɇɿɝ ɭɣɻȝɻɣʳ Ȩȝɕȳȯ ɣɰ Ȩɣɇɗȳȯ
- ́ ȩɿɭ ɣȾ ɝȝɴɄȳȯ ɭɣɻȝɻɣʵ ́ ɗȝɰȿȳʳ ɴʋȳȳɻ ɭɣɻȝɻɣʳ Ȩȝɕȳȯʵ ́ ȩɿɭ ɣȾ ȩɣɣɕȳȯ ɴʋȳȳɻ ɭɣɻȝɻɣ ˉɴɗɇȩȳȯ ɣɰ ɝȝɴɄȳȯˊ
- ́ ȩɿɭ ɣȾ ȩɣɰɞ ɕȳɰɞȳɗɴʳ ȾɰȳɴɄ ɣɰ Ⱦɰɣʗȳɞ

###### Ǯɰȝȩɻɇȩȝɗ ɻɇɭɴʴ
- ǵɿȨɴɻɇɻɿɻȳ ɰȳʟɞȳȯ ȿɰȝɇɞɴ ˉȳʲȿʲʳ ʋɄɇɻȳ Ȩɰȳȝȯˊ Ȩʑ ʋɄɣɗȳ ȿɰȝɇɞ Ȩɰȳȝȯɴ ȝɞȯ ȩȳɰȳȝɗɴʲ
- Ǟȝɕȳ ɝɣɴɻ ɣȾ ʑɣɿɰ ȩɄɣɇȩȳɴ ʋɄɣɗȳ ȿɰȝɇɞ ɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ˉȨɰɣʋɞ ɰɇȩȳʳ ʋɄɣɗȳ ʋɄȳȝɻ ɭȝɴɻȝ ȝɞȯ ʋɄɣɗȳ ȿɰȝɇɞ Ȩɰȳȝȯˊʲ
- ȌɄɣɗȳ ȿɰȝɇɞ ȩȳɰȳȝɗɴ ʋɇɗɗ ɕȳȳɭ ʑɣɿ Ⱦɿɗɗ ɗɣɞȿȳɰ ɻɄȝɞ Ⱦɣɣȯɴ ɝȝȯȳ Ⱦɰɣɝ ɰȳʟɞȳȯ ȩȳɰȳȝɗɴʲ
- Ǟȝɕȳ ɴȝɞȯʋɇȩɄȳɴ ɿɴɇɞȿ ʋɄɣɗȳ ȿɰȝɇɞ Ȩɰȳȝȯɴʲ
- ǖȳȳɭ ɝɣȯȳɰȝɻȳ ɭɣɰɻɇɣɞ ɴɇʗȳɴ ˆ ȳɴɭȳȩɇȝɗɗʑ Ⱦɣɰ ɰȳʟɞȳȯ Ⱦɣɣȯɴ ɗɇɕȳ ɭȝɴɻȝ ȝɞȯ ʋɄɇɻȳ ɰɇȩȳʲ
- ȌɄȳɞ ȳȝɻɇɞȿ ɣɿɻʳ ɣɰȯȳɰ ɭȝɴɻȝ ʋɇɻɄ ȝ ɻɣɝȝɻɣ˅Ȩȝɴȳȯ ɴȝɿȩȳ ɰȝɻɄȳɰ ɻɄȝɞ ȩɰȳȝɝ˅Ȩȝɴȳȯ ɴȝɿȩȳʲ
- Ǯɰȳɭȝɰȳ ʑɣɿɰ ȩȳɰȳȝɗ˅Ȩȝɴȳȯ ȯɇɴɄȳɴ ʋɇɻɄ ʋɄɣɗȳ ȿɰȝɇɞɴ ɗɇɕȳ ʋɄɣɗȳ ʋɄȳȝɻ ʠɣɿɰʳ ʋɄɣɗȳ ʋɄȳȝɻ ȿɰȝɇɞɴʳ Ȩɰɣʋɞ ɰɇȩȳʳ ɒȝɰȳȳɴɄ ˉȩɰɿɴɄȳȯ ʋɄȳȝɻˊʳ ʋɄɣɗȳ ɣȝɻɴ ɣɰ ɣȝɻɝȳȝɗʳ Ȩȝɰɗȳʑʳ ʋɄɣɗȳ ʋɄȳȝɻ ɭȝɴɻȝʲ
- ǵɻȝɰɻ ʑɣɿɰ ȯȝʑ ʋɇɻɄ ȝ Ȩɣʋɗ ɣȾ ɣȝɻɝȳȝɗʳ ʋɄɣɗȳ ȿɰȝɇɞ ȩȳɰȳȝɗ ɣɰ ȝ ʋɄɣɗȳ ʋɄȳȝɻ ɻɣȝɴɻ ɇɞɴɻȳȝȯ ɣȾ ȳȝɻɇɞȿ ȝ Ⱦȝɻȝʑȳɰʳ ȩɰɣɇɴɴȝɞɻ ɣɰ ɝɿʝɞʲ
- ƬɄɣɣɴȳ ȩȳɰȳȝɗɴ ɭɰȳɭȝɰȳȯ ʋɇɻɄ ɗɇɻɻɗȳ ɣɰ ɞɣ ȝȯȯȳȯ Ⱦȝɻʳ ɣɇɗʳ ɴɿȿȝɰʳ ȝɞȯ ɴȝɗɻʲ
- ǖȳȳɭ Ȩɇɴȩɿɇɻɴʳ ȩȝɕȳɴʳ ɭȝɴɻɰɇȳɴʳ ȝɞȯ ɭɇȳɴ Ⱦɣɰ ɴɭȳȩɇȝɗ ɣȩȩȝɴɇɣɞɴʲ
- Ǉȝʊȳ ȝ Ȩȝɕȳȯ ɣɰ Ȩɣɇɗȳȯ ɭɣɻȝɻɣʳ ɴʋȳȳɻ ɭɣɻȝɻɣʳ ɣɰ ɴȝɗȝȯ ɇɞɴɻȳȝȯ ɣȾ ȾɰȳɞȩɄ Ⱦɰɇȳɴʲ
- ǘɇɝɇɻ Ⱦɰɇȳȯ Ȩɰȳȝȯɴ ˉȩɄȝɭȝɻɇ ȝɞȯʿɣɰ ȯɣɿȿɄɞɿɻɴˊ ȝɞȯ Ȩȝɕȳɰʑ ɭɰɣȯɿȩɻɴ ɻɄȝɻ ȩɣɞɻȝɇɞ ȝ ɗɣɻ ɣȾ Ⱦȝɻ ȝɞȯ ɣɇɗ ˉɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ȩɰɣɇɴɴȝɞɻ ȝɞȯʿɣɰ Ⱦȝɻȝʑȳɰˊʲ
- ǼɄȳ ȯȝɇɗʑ ȩɣɞɴɿɝɭɻɇɣɞ ɣȾ ʋɄɣɗȳ ȿɰȝɇɞɴ ɇɴ ȝɴɴɣȩɇȝɻȳȯ ʋɇɻɄ ɰȳȯɿȩȳȯ ɰɇɴɕ ɣȾ ʋȳɇȿɄɻ ȿȝɇɞʲ
- Ǳȳȝȯ Ⱦɣɣȯ ɗȝȨȳɗɴ ɻɣ ȩɄɣɣɴȳ Ⱦɣɣȯɴ ʋɇɻɄ ɄɇȿɄ ʟȨȳɰ ȝɞȯ ɞɿɻɰɇȳɞɻ ȩɣɞɻȳɞɻ ȝɞȯ ɻɣ ȝʊɣɇȯ Ʉʑȯɰɣȿȳɞȝɻȳȯ or trans-fat.
- Ǳȳȝȯ Ⱦɣɣȯ ɗȝȨȳɗɴ ɻɣ ɝȝɕȳ ɴɿɰȳ ʋɄɣɗȳ ȿɰȝɇɞ ɣɰ ʋɄɣɗȳ ʋɄȳȝɻ ɇɴ ʟɰɴɻ ɣɞ ɻɄȳ ɗɇɴɻ ɣȾ ɇɞȿɰȳȯɇȳɞɻɴʲ

- Ǯɇȩɕ ȩȝɞɞȳȯ ʟɴɄ ɭȝȩɕȳȯ ɇɞ ʋȝɻȳɰ ɰȝɻɄȳɰ ɻɄȝɞ ɣɇɗʲ
- ȌɄȳɞ ȯɇɞɇɞȿ ɣɿɻʳ ȩɄɣɣɴȳ ʟɴɄ ɴȳȝɴɣɞȳȯ ʋɇɻɄ ɄȳɰȨɴ ȝɞȯ ɗȳɝɣɞ ɇɞɴɻȳȝȯ ɣȾ ȝ ɄɇȿɄ˅Ⱦȝɻ ɴȝɿȩȳʲ
- Ȍɰȝɭ ȝ ʟɴɄ ʟɗɗȳɻ ȝɗɣɞȿ ʋɇɻɄ ʊȳȿȳɻȝȨɗȳɴ ȝɞȯ ɄȳɰȨɴ ɇɞ ȝ ɭȝɰȩɄɝȳɞɻ ɭȝɭȳɰ ȝɞȯ Ȩȝɕȳ ɇɞ ɻɄȳ ɣʊȳɞʲ

###### Ǯɣɿɗɻɰʑ ȝɞȯ ɝȳȝɻʴ ƬɄɣɣɴȳ ɴɕɇɞɗȳɴɴ ɭɣɿɗɻɰʑ ȝɞȯ ɗȳȝɞ ȩɿɻɴ ɣȾ ɝȳȝɻʴ
- Ǳȳɝɣʊȳ ɴɕɇɞ Ⱦɰɣɝ ɭɣɿɗɻɰʑ ȨȳȾɣɰȳ ȩɣɣɕɇɞȿ ɣɰ Ȩɿʑ ɴɕɇɞɗȳɴɴ ɭɇȳȩȳɴʲ
- ǘɇɝɇɻ ʑɣɿɰ ȩɣɞɴɿɝɭɻɇɣɞ ɣȾ ɰȳȯ ɝȳȝɻ ɻɣ ɞɣ ɝɣɰȳ ɻɄȝɞ ̶̶̻ ȿ ɭȳɰ ʋȳȳɕ [16] .
- ǘɇɝɇɻ ʑɣɿɰ ȩɣɞɴɿɝɭɻɇɣɞ ɣȾ ɭɰɣȩȳɴɴȳȯ ɗɿɞȩɄȳɣɞ ȝɞȯ ȯȳɗɇ ɝȳȝɻɴ ɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ȩɣɰɞȳȯ ȨȳȳȾʳ Ʉɣɻ ȯɣȿɴʳ ɴȝɿɴȝȿȳɴʳ ɭȳɭɭȳɰɣɞɇʳ ɴȝɗȝɝɇ ȝɞȯ ɴɝɣɕȳȯ ɝȳȝɻʳ ȝɴ ɻɄȳʑ ȝɰȳ ɄɇȿɄ ɇɞ ɴȝɗɻ ȝɞȯ ɞɇɻɰȝɻȳɴ ˉȩȝɞȩȳɰ˅ȩȝɿɴɇɞȿ ȩɣɞɴɻɇɻɿȳɞɻɴˊʲ Ǟȝɕȳ ɴȝɞȯʋɇȩɄȳɴ ʋɇɻɄ ɗɣʋȳɰ Ⱦȝɻʳ ɿɞɭɰɣȩȳɴɴȳȯ ɣɭɻɇɣɞɴ ɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ɰɣȝɴɻ ȨȳȳȾʳ ɻɿɰɕȳʑʳ ɣɰ ȩɄɇȩɕȳɞʲ
- ƬɄɣɣɴȳ ɗȳɴɴ Ⱦȝɻɻʑ ȩɿɻɴ ɣȾ ɝȳȝɻ ɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ɗȳȿ ɣȾ ɗȝɝȨ ˉȝȾɻȳɰ ɰȳɝɣʊɇɞȿ ʊɇɴɇȨɗȳ Ⱦȝɻˊʳ ɗȳȝɞ ȿɰɣɿɞȯ ȨȳȳȾʳ and beef tenderloin.
- Ǽȳɞȯȳɰɇʗȳ ɗȳȝɞ ȩɿɻɴ ɣȾ ɝȳȝɻ Ȩʑ ɿɴɇɞȿ ȝ ɝȝɰɇɞȝȯȳ ɣɰ ȝ ɴɗɣʋ ȩɣɣɕɇɞȿ ɝȳɻɄɣȯ ɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ɴɻȳʋɇɞȿ ɣɰ Ȩɰȝɇɴɇɞȿʲ
- Ǽɰɇɝ ɣʜ ȝɗɗ ʊɇɴɇȨɗȳ Ⱦȝɻɴ Ⱦɰɣɝ ɝȳȝɻɴʲ Ʋɇɴȩȝɰȯ Ⱦȝɻ ȯɰɇɭɭɇɞȿɴ Ⱦɰɣɝ ȩɣɣɕȳȯ ɝȳȝɻʲ
- ƫɰɣɇɗʳ ȿɰɇɗɗʳ ɰɣȝɴɻʳ ɭɣȝȩɄ ɣɰ Ȩɣɇɗ ɭɣɿɗɻɰʑ ȝɞȯ ɝȳȝɻ ɇɞɴɻȳȝȯ ɣȾ Ⱦɰʑɇɞȿʲ
- If frying meat, use little oil.
- Ǯɰȳɭȝɰȳ ʑɣɿɰ Ⱦɣɣȯɴ ʋɇɻɄɣɿɻ ȩɣȝɻɇɞȿ ˉɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ Ȩɰȳȝȯȳȯ Ⱦɣɣȯɴˊʵ ȝʊɣɇȯ ɰɇȩɄ ɴȝɿȩȳɴ ȝɞȯ ȿɰȝʊɇȳɴʲ
- ǘɇɝɇɻ ɭɰȳ˅ɭɰȳɭȝɰȳȯ Ȩɰȳȝȯȳȯ Ⱦɣɣȯɴ ɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ɞɿȿȿȳɻɴʲ

#### Box 4:  PROTEIN FOODS
![Picture 33](images/SRC013/picture-033.png)
Ǟȝɕȳ ɴɿɰȳ ɻɣ ɇɞȩɗɿȯȳ ɭɰɣɻȳɇɞ ɰɇȩɄ Ⱦɣɣȯɴ ɇɞ ʑɣɿɰ ȯȝɇɗʑ ȯɇȳɻʲ ǼɄȳɴȳ ɇɞȩɗɿȯȳ ɗȳȿɿɝȳɴʳ ʟɴɄʳ ɭɣɿɗɻɰʑʳ ɗȳȝɞ ɝȳȝɻʳ ȳȿȿɴ ȝɞȯ ɿɞɴȝɗɻȳȯʳ ɰȝʋ ɞɿɻɴ ȝɞȯ ɴȳȳȯɴʲ
ǂȳɞȳɰȝɗ ɰȳȩɣɝɝȳɞȯȝɻɇɣɞɴ Ⱦɣɰ ɭɰɣɻȳɇɞ Ⱦɣɣȯɴ ȝɰȳ ̻˅̻ʲ̻ ɴȳɰʊɇɞȿɴ ɭȳɰ ȯȝʑʲ ƶʐȝɝɭɗȳɴ ɣȾ ɣɞȳ ɴȳɰʊɇɞȿ ɇɞȩɗɿȯȳ [17] :
- ͂ ȩɿɭ ȩɣɣɕȳȯ Ȩȳȝɞɴʳ ɭȳȝɴʳ ȝɞȯ ɗȳɞɻɇɗɴ
- ̷ ɣɿɞȩȳ ˉ̶̹ ȿˊ ɣȾ ȩɣɣɕȳȯ ɴȳȝȾɣɣȯʳ ɴɕɇɞɗȳɴɴ ȩɄɇȩɕȳɞʳ ȝɞȯ ɗȳȝɞ ɝȳȝɻɴ
- ̷ ȳȿȿ ɣɰ ̷́ ȳȿȿ ʋɄɇɻȳɴ
- ́ ɣɿɞȩȳ ˉ̷̻ ȿˊ ɰȝʋʳ ɿɞɴȝɗɻȳȯ ɞɿɻɴ ɣɰ ɴȳȳȯɴ ˉɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ̷̸ ȝɗɝɣɞȯɴ ɣɰ ̽ ʋȝɗɞɿɻ Ʉȝɗʊȳɴ ɣɰ ͂ ȩɿɭ ɣȾ ɴȳȳȯɴˊ
- ̸ ɻȝȨɗȳɴɭɣɣɞɴ ɣȾ Ʉɿɝɝɿɴ
- ̷ ɻȝȨɗȳɴɭɣɣɞ ɣȾ ɭȳȝɞɿɻ Ȩɿɻɻȳɰ

CHAPTER 1 DIET AND LIFESTYLE BEFORE PREGNANCY > Dietary Recommendations During the Pre-Pregnancy Period > 4.1. Adequate and balanced diet > Box 4:  PROTEIN FOODS > ̺ʲ̸ʲ Ǟɣɰȳ ȝȨɣɿɻ ʟɴɄ
##### ̺ʲ̸ʲ Ǟɣɰȳ ȝȨɣɿɻ ʟɴɄ
ǁɇɴɄ ɇɴ ȝɞ ɇɝɭɣɰɻȝɞɻ ɴɣɿɰȩȳ ɣȾ ɄɇȿɄ˅ɯɿȝɗɇɻʑ ɭɰɣɻȳɇɞ ȝɞȯ ɣɝȳȿȝ˅̹ Ⱦȝɻɻʑ ȝȩɇȯɴ ˉʋɄɇȩɄ ɇɴ ȝ ɄȳȝɗɻɄʑ ɻʑɭȳ ɣȾ Ⱦȝɻˊʲ Ǥɇɗʑ ʟɴɄ Ʉȝɴ ɻɄȳ ɄɇȿɄȳɴɻ ȝɝɣɿɞɻɴ ɣȾ ɣɝȳȿȝ˅̹ Ⱦȝɻɻʑ ȝȩɇȯɴʲ ǼɄɇɴ ɇɞȩɗɿȯȳɴ ʟɴɄ ɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ɴȝɰȯɇɞȳɴʳ ɴȝɗɝɣɞʳ ɣʑɴɻȳɰɴ ȝɞȯ ɴɣɝȳ ʊȝɰɇȳɻɇȳɴ ɣȾ ȩȝɞɞȳȯ ɻɿɞȝ ˉȩȝɞɞȳȯ ɇɞ ʋȝɻȳɰʳ ɗɇȿɄɻˊ [14] . Zobaidy ˉɝȝɗȝȨȝɰ ȩȝʊȝɗɗȝˊ ȝɞȯ ȿɿȨȿɿȨ ˉɴȳȝ ȩɰȝȨˊ ȝɰȳ ȝɗɴɣ ɗɣȩȝɗ ɻʑɭȳɴ ɣȾ ʟɴɄ ɻɄȝɻ ȩɣɞɻȝɇɞ ɴɣɝȳ ɣɝȳȿȝ˅̹ fatty acids.
ȌɄɇɗȳ ʟɴɄ ɇɴ ʊȳɰʑ ɄȳȝɗɻɄʑʳ ɴɣɝȳ ɗȝɰȿȳɰ ʋɇɗȯ ʟɴɄ ˉȳʲȿʲʳ ȿɰɣɿɭȳɰʳ ɕɇɞȿ ɝȝȩɕȳɰȳɗʳ ɻɿɞȝˊ ɝȝʑ ȩɣɞɻȝɇɞ ȩɣɞɻȝɝɇɞȝɞɻɴ ɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ɝȳɰȩɿɰʑʲ  ǘɇɝɇɻȳȯ ȯȝɻȝ ȳʐɇɴɻɴ ȝȨɣɿɻ ɻɄȳ ɝȳɰȩɿɰʑ ȩɣɞɻȳɞɻ ɣȾ ʟɴɄ ɇɞ ɻɄȳ ƠɰȝȨɇȝɞ ǂɿɗȾʲ ǵɣɝȳ Ⱦȝɰɝȳȯ ʟɴɄ ȩȝɞ ȩɣɞɻȝɇɞ ɄȝɰɝȾɿɗ ȩɄȳɝɇȩȝɗɴ ȝɞȯ ȯɇɣʐɇɞɴʲ ǱȳɴȳȝɰȩɄ ɴɿȿȿȳɴɻɴ ɻɄȳ  ɄȳȝɗɻɄ  Ȩȳɞȳʟɻɴ  ɣȾ  ʟɴɄ  ɣɿɻʋȳɇȿɄ  ɻɄȳ  ɰɇɴɕɴ [18] ʲ  Ǥɞɗɇɞȳ  ɴȳȝȾɣɣȯ  ȿɿɇȯȳɴ  ɭɰɣʊɇȯȳ  ɇɞȾɣɰɝȝɻɇɣɞ ȝȨɣɿɻ ʋɄɇȩɄ ʟɴɄ ȝɞȯ ɴȳȝȾɣɣȯ ȝɰȳ ɻɄȳ ɄȳȝɗɻɄɇȳɴɻ ȝɞȯ ɝɣɴɻ ȳɞʊɇɰɣɞɝȳɞɻȝɗɗʑ Ⱦɰɇȳɞȯɗʑʲ
ǼɄȳ Ⱦɣɗɗɣʋɇɞȿ ȝɰȳ ɇɝɭɣɰɻȝɞɻ ɰȳȩɣɝɝȳɞȯȝɻɇɣɞɴ ɰȳɗȝɻȳȯ ɻɣ ʟɴɄ [19] :
- ƶȝɻ ȝ ʊȝɰɇȳɻʑ ɣȾ ʟɴɄ ȝɴ ɻɄɇɴ ʋɇɗɗ ɝɇɞɇɝɇʗȳ ʑɣɿɰ ɰɇɴɕ ɣȾ ȳʐɭɣɴɿɰȳ ɻɣ ɄȝɰɝȾɿɗ ȩɄȳɝɇȩȝɗɴʲ
- Ơɇɝ Ⱦɣɰ ɻɄȳ ƫȳɴɻ ƬɄɣɇȩȳɴ ɣȾ ʟɴɄ ˉɗɇɴɻȳȯ ɇɞ ƫɣʐ ̻ˊʴ ʑɣɿ ȩȝɞ ȩɣɞɴɿɝȳ ȝ ʊȝɰɇȳɻʑ ɣȾ ɻɄȳɴȳ ʟɴɄ ȝɻ ɗȳȝɴɻ ɻʋɇȩȳ ȝ ʋȳȳɕʲ
- ǁɣɰ ɻɄȳ ɻʑɭȳɴ ɣȾ ʟɴɄ ɗɇɴɻȳȯ ɿɞȯȳɰ ǂɣɣȯ ƬɄɣɇȩȳɴʴ ʑɣɿ ȩȝɞ ȩɣɞɴɿɝȳ ɻɄȳɴȳ ɣɞɗʑ ɣɞȩȳ ɭȳɰ ʋȳȳɕʲ
- ƫɣʐ ̻ ȝɗɴɣ ɗɇɴɻɴ ɻɄȳ ɻʑɭȳ ɣȾ ʟɴɄ ɻɣ ɗɇɝɇɻʲ
![Picture 34](images/SRC013/picture-034.png)

ʽǱȳȝȯ ȩȝɞɞȳȯ ɻɿɞȝ ɗȝȨȳɗɴ ȩȝɰȳȾɿɗɗʑʳ ɗɇɝɇɻ ʑɣɿɰ ɇɞɻȝɕȳ ɣȾ ɻɿɞȝ ʋɄɇɻȳʿȝɗȨȝȩɣɰȳ ɻɣ ɣɞȩȳ ɭȳɰ ʋȳȳɕʳ ȝɞȯ ȝʊɣɇȯ ɻɿɞȝ Ȩɇȿȳʑȳʲ Ƭȝɞɞȳȯ ɗɇȿɄɻ ɻɿɞȝ ˉȝ ɝɇʐ ɣȾ ȝ ʊȝɰɇȳɻʑ ɣȾ ɴɝȝɗɗȳɰ ɻɿɞȝ ɴɭȳȩɇȳɴʳ ɝȝɇɞɗʑ ɴɕɇɭɒȝȩɕˊʳ ɇɴ ȝ ɴȝȾȳ ɣɭɻɇɣɞ Ⱦɣɰ ʑɣɿʲ

CHAPTER 1 DIET AND LIFESTYLE BEFORE PREGNANCY > Dietary Recommendations During the Pre-Pregnancy Period > 4.3. More about fats and oils
### 4.3. More about fats and oils
Choose healthy oils and use them in moderation. It is recommended that you:
- ƬɄɣɣɴȳ ʊȳȿȳɻȝȨɗȳ ɣɇɗɴ ɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ɣɗɇʊȳʳ ȩȝɞɣɗȝʳ ȩɣɰɞʳ ɣɰ ɴɿɞʠɣʋȳɰ ɣɇɗɴ Ⱦɣɰ ɻɄȳ ɭɰȳɭȝɰȝɻɇɣɞ ɣȾ foods.
- ǘɇɝɇɻ ɻɄȳ ɇɞɻȝɕȳ ɣȾ ɻɰɣɭɇȩȝɗ ɭɗȝɞɻ ɣɇɗɴ ɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ȩɣȩɣɞɿɻ ɣɇɗ ȝɞȯ ɭȝɗɝ ɣɇɗ ȝɴ ɻɄȳʑ ȝɰȳ ɄɇȿɄ ɇɞ saturated  fat.
- ǘɇɝɇɻ ɻɄȳ ɇɞɻȝɕȳ ɣȾ ȝɞɇɝȝɗ˅Ȩȝɴȳȯ Ⱦȝɻɴ ɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ Ȩɿɻɻȳɰʳ ȩɰȳȝɝʳ ȝɞȯ ȿɄȳȳ ȝɴ ɻɄȳʑ ȝɰȳ ɄɇȿɄ ɇɞ saturated  fat.
- ǘɇɝɇɻ  ɻɄȳ  ȩɣɞɴɿɝɭɻɇɣɞ ɣȾ ɭɰɣȯɿȩɻɴ ɻɄȝɻ ȩɣɞɻȝɇɞ ɭȝɰɻɇȝɗɗʑ Ʉʑȯɰɣȿȳɞȝɻȳȯ ɣɇɗɴ ɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ɻɄɣɴȳ ɭɰȳɴȳɞɻ ɇɞ Ⱦȝɴɻ Ⱦɣɣȯɴʳ Ⱦɰɇȳȯ Ⱦɣɣȯɴʳ ɭɰɣȩȳɴɴȳȯ ɝȳȝɻɴʳ ȝɞȯ ȩɣɝɝȳɰȩɇȝɗɗʑ Ȩȝɕȳȯ ɴʋȳȳɻɴʳ Ȩɇɴȩɿɇɻɴ ȝɞȯ ȩɰȝȩɕȳɰɴ ȝɞȯ ȩɣɝɝȳɰȩɇȝɗɗʑ Ȩȝɕȳȯ ɭɇȳɴʲ

##### ̺ʲ̺ʲ Ȓɣɿɰ ʠɿɇȯ ɞȳȳȯɴ
Ǌɞ ȝȯȯɇɻɇɣɞ ɻɣ ɻɄȳ ȩɣɞɴɿɝɭɻɇɣɞ ɣȾ ȝɞ ȝȯȳɯɿȝɻȳʳ ʊȝɰɇȳȯʳ ȝɞȯ Ȩȝɗȝɞȩȳȯ  ȯɇȳɻʳ  ɇɻ  ɇɴ  ȳɴɴȳɞɻɇȝɗ  ɻɄȝɻ  ʑɣɿ  ȯɰɇɞɕ  ȝɞ  ȝȯȳɯɿȝɻȳ ȝɝɣɿɞɻ  ɣȾ  ʋȝɻȳɰ  ȯȝɇɗʑʲ  Ȍȝɻȳɰ  ɇɴ  ȝɞ  ȳɴɴȳɞɻɇȝɗ  ɞɿɻɰɇȳɞɻ ɻɄȝɻ ȩɣɞɴɻɇɻɿɻȳɴ ȝɰɣɿɞȯ ̶̽̉ ɣȾ ʑɣɿɰ Ȩɣȯʑ ʋȳɇȿɄɻ ȝɞȯ ɇɴ involved in all bodily functions, including regulating body ɻȳɝɭȳɰȝɻɿɰȳʳ  ɭɰȳʊȳɞɻɇɞȿ  ȯȳɄʑȯɰȝɻɇɣɞ  ȝɞȯ  ɝȝɇɞɻȝɇɞɇɞȿ  ȝ ɄȳȝɗɻɄʑ Ȩɣȯʑ ʋȳɇȿɄɻ ˍ̾ʳ ̸̶ʳ ̸̷ˎ ʲ ǼɄȳɰȳȾɣɰȳʳ ɇɻ ɇɴ ɇɝɭɣɰɻȝɞɻ ɻɄȝɻ ʑɣɿ ȯɰɇɞɕ ̾˅̷̸ ȩɿɭɴ ɣȾ ʠɿɇȯɴ ɭȳɰ ȯȝʑ ɇɞȩɗɿȯɇɞȿ ʋȝɻȳɰ ˉɇʲȳʲ ̸ ˅ ̹ ǘˊ [9] ʲ ǼɄȳ ɇɞɻȝɕȳ ɣȾ ʋȝɻȳɰ ɇɴ ȩɰɇɻɇȩȝɗ ɇɞ ȩɣɿɞɻɰɇȳɴ ʋɇɻɄ Ʉɣɻ ȝɞȯ Ʉɿɝɇȯ ʋȳȝɻɄȳɰʳ ɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ɻɄȝɻ ɇɞ ɻɄȳ ǵɻȝɻȳ ɣȾ ǰȝɻȝɰʲ ƫɣʐ ̼ ɭɰȳɴȳɞɻɴ ʑɣɿ ʋɇɻɄ ɴɣɝȳ ɻɇɭɴ ɣɞ Ʉɣʋ ɻɣ ɝȳȳɻ ʑɣɿɰ ȯȝɇɗʑ  ʋȝɻȳɰ ɞȳȳȯɴʲ

##### ƫɣʐ ̼ʲ Ǽɇɭɴ ɻɣ ɝȳȳɻ ʑɣɿɰ ʋȝɻȳɰ ɞȳȳȯɴ
- Ǟȝɕȳ ɭɗȝɇɞ ʋȝɻȳɰ ʑɣɿɰ ɝȝɇɞ ɴɣɿɰȩȳ ɣȾ ʠɿɇȯɴ ɭȳɰ ȯȝʑʲ
- ƬɄɣɣɴȳ ʋȝɻȳɰ ɝɣɰȳ ɣȾɻȳɞ ɻɄȝɞ ɣɻɄȳɰ ɻʑɭȳɴ ɣȾ Ȩȳʊȳɰȝȿȳɴʲ
- ǊȾ ʑɣɿ ȯɣ ɞɣɻ ɗɇɕȳ ʋȝɻȳɰʳ ȝȯȯ ȝ ʋȳȯȿȳ ɣȾ ɗɇɝȳʳ ɗȳɝɣɞʳ ɣɰ ȝɞʑ ɣɻɄȳɰ ʊȳȿȳɻȝȨɗȳ ɣɰ Ⱦɰɿɇɻ ɻɣ ȳɞɄȝɞȩȳ ɻɄȳ taste.
- Ƭȝɰɰʑ ȝ ɰȳɿɴȝȨɗȳ ʋȝɻȳɰ Ȩɣɻɻɗȳ ȳʊȳɰʑʋɄȳɰȳ ʑɣɿ ȿɣʲ
- ƬɄɣɣɴȳ ʋȝɻȳɰ ȝɴ ȝ Ȩȳʊȳɰȝȿȳ ɻɣ ȯɰɇɞɕ ʋɇɻɄ ɝȳȝɗɴʳ ȳɴɭȳȩɇȝɗɗʑ ʋɄȳɞ ȳȝɻɇɞȿ ɣɿɻʲ ǼɄɇɴ ʋɇɗɗ Ʉȳɗɭ ɰȳȯɿȩȳ ʑɣɿɰ ȩȝɗɣɰɇȩ ɇɞɻȝɕȳʲ
- ƬɄɣɣɴȳ ʋȝɻȳɰ ɇɞɴɻȳȝȯ ɣȾ ɴɿȿȝɰ˅ɴʋȳȳɻȳɞȳȯ Ȩȳʊȳɰȝȿȳɴ ɻɣ Ʉȳɗɭ ɝȝɇɞɻȝɇɞ ʑɣɿɰ ʋȳɇȿɄɻ ȝɞȯ ɻɄȳ ɄȳȝɗɻɄ of your teeth.
- Ʋɰɇɞɕ ɝɣɰȳ ʋȝɻȳɰ ɇɞ Ʉɣɻ ʋȳȝɻɄȳɰ ȝɞȯ ʋɄȳɞ ɭɄʑɴɇȩȝɗɗʑ ȝȩɻɇʊȳ ˉȨȳȾɣɰȳʳ ȯɿɰɇɞȿ ȝɞȯ ȝȾɻȳɰ ȳʐȳɰȩɇɴȳˊʲ
- ǵȳɻ ɰȳɝɇɞȯȳɰɴ ɣɞ ʑɣɿɰ ɭɄɣɞȳ Ⱦɣɰ ȯɰɇɞɕɇɞȿ ʋȝɻȳɰ ɣɰ ɿɴȳ ȝ ʋȝɻȳɰ ȯɰɇɞɕɇɞȿ ȝɭɭɗɇȩȝɻɇɣɞ ɣɞ ʑɣɿɰ ɴɝȝɰɻ ɭɄɣɞȳʲ

##### ̺ʲ̻ʲ Ȓɣɿɰ ȩȝʜȳɇɞȳ ɇɞɻȝɕȳ
ƠɗɻɄɣɿȿɄ ɻɄȳ ȳʊɇȯȳɞȩȳ ɰȳȿȝɰȯɇɞȿ ɻɄȳ ȝɴɴɣȩɇȝɻɇɣɞ ɣȾ ȩȝʜȳɇɞȳ ʋɇɻɄ Ⱦȳɰɻɇɗɇɻʑ ɇɴ ɇɞȩɣɞȩɗɿɴɇʊȳʳ ɇɻ ɇɴ ɰȳȩɣɝɝȳɞȯȳȯ ɻɣ ɗɇɝɇɻ ȩȝʜȳɇɞȳ ɇɞɻȝɕȳ ɻɣ ɞɣ ɝɣɰȳ ɻɄȝɞ ̶̶̹ ɝȿ ȯȝɇɗʑ ˉȝɰɣɿɞȯ ̹ ȩɿɭɴ ɣȾ ȩɣʜȳȳ ɭȳɰ ȯȝʑˊ ȯɿɰɇɞȿ ɻɄȳ ɭɰȳ˅ɭɰȳȿɞȝɞȩʑ ɭȳɰɇɣȯ [22] ʲ ƫȳɗɣʋ ɇɴ ȝ ɻȝȨɗȳ ɻɄȝɻ ɭɰɣʊɇȯȳɴ ʑɣɿ ʋɇɻɄ ɻɄȳ ȩȝʜȳɇɞȳ content of some beverages:
ǼȝȨɗȳ ̸ʲ Ƭȝʜȳɇɞȳ ȩɣɞɻȳɞɻ ɣȾ ɴȳɗȳȩɻȳȯ Ȩȳʊȳɰȝȿȳɴ
| Ʋɰɇɞɕɴ                                   | ǵɇʗȳ             |   Ƭȝʜȳɇɞȳ ˉɝȿˊ |
|------------------------------------------|------------------|----------------|
| Ƭɣʜȳȳ Ȩɰȳʋȳȯ                             | ̷ ȩɿɭ ˉ̸̹̽ ɝɗˊ       |             96 |
| Ƭɣʜȳȳ ȳɴɭɰȳɴɴɣ                           | ̷ ɴɝȝɗɗ ȩɿɭ ˉ̶̹ ɝɗˊ |             64 |
| Ƭɣʜȳȳ ɇɞɴɻȝɞɻ                            | ̷ ȩɿɭ ˉ̸̹̽ ɝɗˊ       |             62 |
| Ǽȳȝ Ȩɗȝȩɕ                                | ̷ ȩɿɭ ˉ̸̹̽ ɝɗˊ       |             47 |
| Tea green                                | ̷ ȩɿɭ ˉ̸̹̽ ɝɗˊ       |             28 |
| Carbonated sodas ˉȯȳɭȳɞȯɇɞȿ ɣɞ ɻɄȳ ɻʑɭȳˊ | ̷ ȩɿɭ ˉ̸̹̽ ɝɗˊ       |             22 |

##### ̺ʲ̼ʲ ƬɄɣɣɴȳ ʑɣɿɰ ɴɞȝȩɕɴ ʋɇɴȳɗʑ
ȌɄȳɞ  ȩɣɞɴɿɝɇɞȿ  ɴɞȝȩɕɴʳ  ɝȝɕȳ  ɴɿɰȳ  ʑɣɿ  ȩɄɣɣɴȳ  ɄȳȝɗɻɄʑ  ɣɭɻɇɣɞɴʲ  Ǌɞɴɻȳȝȯ  ɣȾ  ȩɣɝɝȳɰȩɇȝɗɗʑ ɭɰɣȩȳɴɴȳȯ  ɴɞȝȩɕɴ  ȩɄɣɣɴȳ  ɻɄɣɴȳ  ɻɄȝɻ  ʋɇɗɗ  ȳɞɰɇȩɄ  ʑɣɿɰ  ȯɇȳɻ  ʋɇɻɄ  ʊɇɻȝɝɇɞɴʳ  ɝɇɞȳɰȝɗɴʳ  ʟȨȳɰʳ  ȝɞȯ ɄȳȝɗɻɄʑ ɻʑɭȳɴ ɣȾ Ⱦȝɻɴʲ ƶɞɒɣʑ ʊȳȿȳɻȝȨɗȳʳ Ⱦɰɿɇɻɴ ȝɞȯ ɴɝȝɗɗ ɄȝɞȯȾɿɗɴ ɣȾ ɿɞɴȝɗɻȳȯʳ ɰȝʋ ɞɿɻɴ ȝɞȯ ɴȳȳȯɴ ˉɗɇɕȳ  ʋȝɗɞɿɻɴʳ  ȝɗɝɣɞȯɴʳ  ɭɇɴɻȝȩɄɇɣɴʳ  ȝɞȯ  ʠȝʐɴȳȳȯɴˊʲ  Ơʊɣɇȯ  ȩɣɝɝȳɰȩɇȝɗɗʑ  ɭɰȳɭȝɰȳȯ  ɴɞȝȩɕɴ  ɻɄȝɻ contain a lot of calories and unhealthy nutritional content such as trans-fat, saturated fat, salt, ȝɞȯ ɴɿȿȝɰʲ ǼɄȳɰȳȾɣɰȳʳ ɻɰʑ ɻɣ ȝʊɣɇȯ ɴɞȝȩɕɇɞȿ ɣɞ Ȩɇɴȩɿɇɻɴʳ ȩɄɣȩɣɗȝɻȳɴʳ ȩȝɕȳɴʳ ȩɰɣɇɴɴȝɞɻɴʳ ɇȩȳ ȩɰȳȝɝɴʳ ȝɞȯ Ȩȳʊȳɰȝȿȳɴ ɗɇɕȳ Ʉɣɻ ȝɞȯ ȩɣɗȯ ɴʋȳȳɻȳɞȳȯ ȩɣʜȳȳɴʳ ɒɿɇȩȳɴʳ ȩȝɰȨɣɞȝɻȳȯ ȯɰɇɞɕɴʳ ɝɇɗɕɴɄȝɕȳɴʳ ȝɞȯ ɴɝɣɣɻɄɇȳɴʲ ƫɣʐ ̽ Ȩȳɗɣʋ ɭɰɣʊɇȯȳɴ ʑɣɿ ʋɇɻɄ ɴɣɝȳ ɻɇɭɴ ɣɞ ɄȳȝɗɻɄʑ ɴɞȝȩɕɇɞȿʲ

##### ƫɣʐ ̽ʲ Ǽɇɭɴ ɣɞ ɄȳȝɗɻɄʑ ɴɞȝȩɕɇɞȿ
- ƶɞɒɣʑ ȳȝɻɇɞȿ Ⱦɣɣȯɴ ɻɄȝɻ ȝɰȳ ɰɇȩɄ ɇɞ ɞɿɻɰɇȳɞɻɴʳ ɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ȾɰȳɴɄ ʊȳȿȳɻȝȨɗȳɴʳ ȾɰȳɴɄ Ⱦɰɿɇɻɴʳ ɰȝʋ ȝɞȯ ɿɞɴȝɗɻȳȯ ɞɿɻɴ ȝɞȯ ɴȳȳȯɴʳ ɭɗȝɇɞ ˉɗɣʋ ɴȝɗɻʳ ɿɞɴȝɗɻȳȯʳ ȝɞȯʿɣɰ ɿɞɴʋȳȳɻȳɞȳȯˊ ɭɣɭȩɣɰɞʳ ʋɄɣɗȳ ȿɰȝɇɞ ȩȳɰȳȝɗ Ȩȝɰɴʳ ɗɣʋ˅Ⱦȝɻ ʑɣȿɿɰɻʲ
- ƶɞɒɣʑ ɴɣɝȳ ɰȝʋ ʊȳȿȳɻȝȨɗȳɴ ˉȩȝɰɰɣɻɴʳ ȩɿȩɿɝȨȳɰɴʳ ȩȝɿɗɇʠɣʋȳɰˊ ʋɇɻɄ ʑɣɿɰ Ⱦȝʊɣɰɇɻȳ ɗɣʋ˅Ⱦȝɻʳ Ʉɣɝȳɝȝȯȳ ȯɇɭ ˉɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ɗȝȨɞȳɄ ɣɰ ȿȝɰɗɇȩ ȯɇɭ ɣɰ Ʉɿɝɝɿɴˊʲ
- ƬɄɣɣɴȳ ɗɣʋ˅Ⱦȝɻ ɭɗȝɇɞ ʑɣȿɿɰɻʳ ɻɣɭɭȳȯ ʋɇɻɄ ȾɰȳɴɄ Ⱦɰɿɇɻɴʳ ȝɴ ʑɣɿɰ ɴɞȝȩɕʲ
- ƶɞɒɣʑ ɴɣɝȳ ɿɞɴȝɗɻȳȯʳ ʋɄɣɗȳ ȿɰȝɇɞ ȩɰȝȩɕȳɰɴ ʋɇɻɄ ɗɣʋ˅Ⱦȝɻʳ ɗɣʋ˅ɴȝɗɻʳ ʋɄɇɻȳ ȩɄȳȳɴȳʲ
- Ǯɰȳɭȝɰȳ ʑɣɿɰ ɣʋɞ Ʉɣɝȳɝȝȯȳ ɝɇɗɕɴɄȝɕȳ ˉɿɴɇɞȿ ɗɣʋ˅Ⱦȝɻ ɝɇɗɕ ȝɞȯ ȾɰȳɴɄ Ⱦɰɿɇɻɴˊʲ
- ǵȳɻ ɰȳȿɿɗȝɰ ɻɇɝȳɴ Ⱦɣɰ ʑɣɿɰ ɴɞȝȩɕɴ ɻɣ Ʉȝʊȳ ȝ ɄȳȝɗɻɄɇȳɰ ȯɇȳɻȝɰʑ ɰɣɿɻɇɞȳʲ
- Ǟȝɕȳ ɴɿɰȳ ɻɣ ɭȝȩɕ ɴɣɝȳ ɄȳȝɗɻɄʑ ɴɞȝȩɕɴ ȨȳȾɣɰȳ Ʉȳȝȯɇɞȿ ɻɣ ʋɣɰɕʲ

ǵɇɞȩȳ ʑɣɿɰ ȨȝȨʑ˔ɴ ɄȳȝɗɻɄ ɰȳɯɿɇɰȳɴ ɒɣɇɞɻ ȳʜɣɰɻ Ⱦɰɣɝ ɝɣɻɄȳɰ ȝɞȯ ȾȝɻɄȳɰʳ ȳɞȩɣɿɰȝȿȳ ʑɣɿɰ ɄɿɴȨȝɞȯ ɻɣ ȝɗɴɣ ȝȯɣɭɻ ȝ ɄȳȝɗɻɄʑ ȯɇȳɻ ȝɞȯ ɗɇȾȳɴɻʑɗȳʲ ǵɻɿȯɇȳɴ Ʉȝʊȳ ɴɄɣʋɞ ɻɄȝɻ ɭȝɰȳɞɻɴ˔ ȳȝɻɇɞȿ ɄȝȨɇɻɴ ɝȝʑ ȝʜȳȩɻ ɻɄȳɇɰ ȩɄɇɗȯɰȳɞ˔ɴ ɄȳȝɗɻɄ ɗȝɻȳɰ ɇɞ ɗɇȾȳʲ ǼɄɿɴʳ ɇɻ ɇɴ ɇɝɭɣɰɻȝɞɻ ɻɄȝɻ ʑɣɿɰ ɄɿɴȨȝɞȯ ȝɗɴɣ ɻȝɕȳɴ ɴɻȳɭɴ ɻɣ ɇɝɭɰɣʊȳ Ʉɇɴ ȳȝɻɇɞȿ ɄȝȨɇɻɴ ȨȳȾɣɰȳ ɭɰȳȿɞȝɞȩʑʲ

##### ̺ʲ̾ʲ ȋɇɻȝɝɇɞɴ ȝɞȯ ɝɇɞȳɰȝɗɴʴ ɇɴ ɻɄȳɰȳ ȝ ɞȳȳȯ Ⱦɣɰ ɴɿɭɭɗȳɝȳɞɻɴʹ
Ǌɞ ɻɄȳ ɭɰȳ˅ɭɰȳȿɞȝɞȩʑ ɭȳɰɇɣȯʳ ʑɣɿ ȝɰȳ ȳɞȩɣɿɰȝȿȳȯ ɻɣ ȩɣɞɴɿɝȳ ȝɞ ȝȯȳɯɿȝɻȳʳ ʊȝɰɇȳȯʳ ȝɞȯ Ȩȝɗȝɞȩȳȯ ȯɇȳɻ ˉȝɴ ɣɿɻɗɇɞȳȯ ɇɞ ɴȳȩɻɇɣɞ ̺ʲ̷ˊ ɻɣ ɝȳȳɻ ʑɣɿɰ ɞɿɻɰɇɻɇɣɞȝɗ ɞȳȳȯɴʳ ɇɞȩɗɿȯɇɞȿ ʊɇɻȝɝɇɞɴ ȝɞȯ ɝɇɞȳɰȝɗɴʲ Ʋɿɰɇɞȿ  ɻɄȳ  ɭɰȳ˅ɭɰȳȿɞȝɞȩʑ  ɭȳɰɇɣȯʳ  ɻɄȳ  ɇɞɻȝɕȳɴ  ɣȾ  Ⱦɣɗɇȩ  ȝȩɇȯʳ  ʊɇɻȝɝɇɞ  Ʋʳ  ȩȝɗȩɇɿɝʳ  ȝɞȯ  ɇɰɣɞʳ  ȝɰȳ ɭȝɰɻɇȩɿɗȝɰɗʑ ɇɝɭɣɰɻȝɞɻ ɴɇɞȩȳ ɝȝɞʑ ʋɣɝȳɞ Ʉȝʊȳ ɇɞɴɿʝȩɇȳɞɻ ɇɞɻȝɕȳɴ ɣȾ ɻɄȳɴȳ ɞɿɻɰɇȳɞɻɴʲ

CHAPTER 1 DIET AND LIFESTYLE BEFORE PREGNANCY > Dietary Recommendations During the Pre-Pregnancy Period > 4.8.1. Folic acid
### 4.8.1. Folic acid
Ǌɻ ɇɴ ɇɝɭɣɰɻȝɞɻ ɻɣ Ʉȝʊȳ ȝɞ ȝȯȳɯɿȝɻȳ ɇɞɻȝɕȳ ɣȾ Ⱦɣɗɇȩ ȝȩɇȯ ȨȳȾɣɰȳ ʑɣɿɰ ɭɰȳȿɞȝɞȩʑʳ ɻɣ ɰȳȯɿȩȳ ɻɄȳ ɰɇɴɕ ɣȾ ɴȳɰɇɣɿɴ ȨɇɰɻɄ ȯȳȾȳȩɻɴ ȝɞȯ ɝȝɗȾɣɰɝȝɻɇɣɞɴ ɇɞ ʑɣɿɰ ȨȝȨʑʲ Ǌɞ Ⱦȝȩɻʳ ȝ ɗɣʋ ɇɞɻȝɕȳ ɣȾ Ⱦɣɗɇȩ ȝȩɇȯ ɝȝʑ ɗȳȝȯ ɻɣ ȨɇɰɻɄ ȯȳȾȳȩɻɴ ɣȾ ɻɄȳ Ȩɰȝɇɞʳ ɴɭɇɞȳ ɣɰ ɴɭɇɞȝɗ ȩɣɰȯʳ ȝɴ ʋȳɗɗ ȝɴ Ʉȳȝɰɻ ɝȝɗȾɣɰɝȝɻɇɣɞɴ [23] . These ȯȳȾȳȩɻɴ ȝɞȯ ɝȝɗȾɣɰɝȝɻɇɣɞɴ ɣȩȩɿɰ ɇɞ ɻɄȳ ʟɰɴɻ ɝɣɞɻɄ ɣȾ ɭɰȳȿɞȝɞȩʑʳ ɣȾɻȳɞ ȨȳȾɣɰȳ ȝ ʋɣɝȝɞ ȳʊȳɞ ɰȳȝɗɇʗȳɴ ɻɄȝɻ ɴɄȳ ɇɴ ɭɰȳȿɞȝɞɻʲ ǼɄȳɰȳȾɣɰȳʳ ʋɣɝȳɞ ʋɄɣ ȝɰȳ ɭɗȝɞɞɇɞȿ ȝ ɭɰȳȿɞȝɞȩʑ ȝɰȳ ɰȳȩɣɝɝȳɞȯȳȯ ɻɣ ɻȝɕȳ ȝ Ⱦɣɗɇȩ ȝȩɇȯ ɴɿɭɭɗȳɝȳɞɻʲ ǼɄȳ ɰȳȩɣɝɝȳɞȯȳȯ ȯɣɴȳ ɣȾ Ⱦɣɗɇȩ ȝȩɇȯ ɴɿɭɭɗȳɝȳɞɻȝɻɇɣɞ ɇɴ ̶̶̺ ɝɇȩɰɣȿɰȝɝɴ ˉɝȩȿˊ ɭȳɰ ȯȝʑʲ Ȍɣɝȳɞ ʋɇɻɄ ȩȳɰɻȝɇɞ ɄȳȝɗɻɄ ȩɣɞȯɇɻɇɣɞɴʳ ɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ȝɞȳɝɇȝ ȝɞȯ ɣȨȳɴɇɻʑʳ ɝȝʑ ɞȳȳȯ ɄɇȿɄȳɰ ȯɣɴȳɴ ɣȾ Ⱦɣɗɇȩ ȝȩɇȯ ɴɿɭɭɗȳɝȳɞɻȝɻɇɣɞ [23] ʲ ǊȾ ʑɣɿ Ʉȝʊȳ ȝ ɭȝɰɻɇȩɿɗȝɰ ɄȳȝɗɻɄ ȩɣɞȯɇɻɇɣɞʳ ɝȝɕȳ ɴɿɰȳ ɻɣ ȩɣɞɴɿɗɻ ʋɇɻɄ ȝ ȯɣȩɻɣɰ ɰȳȿȝɰȯɇɞȿ ɻɄȳ ɰɇȿɄɻ ȯɣɴȳ Ⱦɣɰ ʑɣɿʲ
![Picture 44](images/SRC013/picture-044.png)
Ǌɞ  ȝȯȯɇɻɇɣɞ  ɻɣ  Ⱦɣɗɇȩ  ȝȩɇȯ  ɴɿɭɭɗȳɝȳɞɻɴʳ  ɻɄȳ  ȩɣɞɴɿɝɭɻɇɣɞ  ɣȾ  ȝ  ȯɇȳɻ  ɰɇȩɄ  ɇɞ  Ⱦɣɗȝɻȳ  ˉȾɣɗɇȩ  ȝȩɇȯˊ  ɇɴ ɰȳȩɣɝɝȳɞȯȳȯ  ɇɞ  ɻɄȳ  ɭɰȳ˅ɭɰȳȿɞȝɞȩʑ  ɭȳɰɇɣȯʲ  ǁɣɗɇȩ  ȝȩɇȯ  ɇɴ  ɝȝɇɞɗʑ  Ⱦɣɿɞȯ  ɇɞ  ȯȝɰɕ  ȿɰȳȳɞ  ɗȳȝȾʑ ʊȳȿȳɻȝȨɗȳɴ ˉȳʲȿʲ ɴɭɇɞȝȩɄʳ ɗȳɻɻɿȩȳʳ ȝɴɭȝɰȝȿɿɴʳ Ȩɰɣȩȩɣɗɇˊʳ ȩɇɻɰɿɴ Ⱦɰɿɇɻɴ ˉȳʲȿʲ ɣɰȝɞȿȳɴ ȝɞȯ ɗȳɝɣɞɴˊʳ ɭȝɭȝʑȝʳ Ȩȳȝɞɴʳ ȝɞȯ ɞɿɻɴ [24] ʲ Ǽ ȝȨɗȳ ̹ ɭɰɣʊɇȯȳɴ ʑɣɿ ʋɇɻɄ ȳʐȝɝɭɗȳɴ ɣȾ Ⱦɣɣȯɴ ɻɄȝɻ ȝɰȳ ɰɇȩɄ ɇɞ Ⱦɣɗȝɻȳ [24] . Ȓɣɿ ȝɰȳ ȳɞȩɣɿɰȝȿȳȯ ɻɣ ɇɞȩɣɰɭɣɰȝɻȳ Ⱦɣɣȯɴ ɻɄȝɻ Ȩȳɗɣɞȿ ɻɣ ɻɄȳ ˑȋȳɰʑ ǇɇȿɄ ǵɣɿɰȩȳ˒ ɣɰ ˑǇɇȿɄ ǵɣɿɰȩȳ˒ ɣȾ ȯɇȳɻȝɰʑ Ⱦɣɗȝɻȳ ɇɞ ʑɣɿɰ ȯȝɇɗʑ ȯɇȳɻ ɇȾ ʑɣɿ ȝɰȳ ɭɗȝɞɞɇɞȿ ȝ ɭɰȳȿɞȝɞȩʑʲ

### 4.8.2. Vitamin D
ȋɇɻȝɝɇɞ Ʋ ɇɴ ȝɞ ȳɴɴȳɞɻɇȝɗ ɞɿɻɰɇȳɞɻ ɞȳȳȯȳȯ Ⱦɣɰ ɻɄȳ ɭɰɣɭȳɰ ȝȨɴɣɰɭɻɇɣɞ ɣȾ ȩȝɗȩɇɿɝ ȝɞȯ ɭɄɣɴɭɄɣɰɿɴʳ ʋɄɇɗȳ ȝɗɴɣ Ȩȳɇɞȿ ɇɝɭɣɰɻȝɞɻ Ⱦɣɰ ɻɄȳ ɄȳȝɗɻɄ ɣȾ ʑɣɿɰ Ȩɣɞȳɴʲ ƶʊȳɞ ɻɄɣɿȿɄ ʑɣɿ ȩȝɞ ɝȳȳɻ ɭȝɰɻ ɣȾ ʑɣɿɰ ʊɇɻȝɝɇɞ Ʋ ɰȳɯɿɇɰȳɝȳɞɻ ɻɄɰɣɿȿɄ ɴɿɞɗɇȿɄɻ ȳʐɭɣɴɿɰȳʳ ɇɻ ɇɴ ȝɗɴɣ ɇɝɭɣɰɻȝɞɻ ɻɣ ȩɣɞɴɿɝȳ Ⱦɣɣȯɴ ɰɇȩɄ ɇɞ vitamin D. These are listed in T able 4 [25, 26] ʲ  Ȓ ɣɿɰ ȯɣȩɻɣɰ ɝȝʑ ɰȳɯɿɇɰȳ ɻɄȝɻ ʑɣɿ ɻȝɕȳ ʊɇɻȝɝɇɞ Ʋ ɴɿɭɭɗȳɝȳɞɻɴ ɇȾ ɻɄȳʑ Ⱦɣɿɞȯ ɻɄȝɻ ʑɣɿ Ʉȝʊȳ ʊɇɻȝɝɇɞ Ʋ ȯȳʟȩɇȳɞȩʑʲ

### 4.8.3. Calcium
Ǌɞ ȝȯȯɇɻɇɣɞ ɻɣ ʊɇɻȝɝɇɞ Ʋʳ ɄȳȝɗɻɄʑ Ȩɣɞȳɴ ȝɞȯ ɻȳȳɻɄ ɰȳɯɿɇɰȳ ȝɞ ȝȯȳɯɿȝɻȳ ɗȳʊȳɗ ɣȾ ȩȝɗȩɇɿɝ ȩɣɞɴɿɝɭɻɇɣɞʲ Ƭȝɗȩɇɿɝ ɇɴ ɇɝɭɣɰɻȝɞɻ Ⱦɣɰ ɝȝɞʑ Ⱦɿɞȩɻɇɣɞɴ ɇɞ ɻɄȳ Ȩɣȯʑʲ ǼɄȳɰȳȾɣɰȳʳ ɇɻ ɇɴ ȩɰɇɻɇȩȝɗ ɻɄȝɻ ʑɣɿ ȩɣɞɴɿɝȳ ȝȯȳɯɿȝɻȳ ȝɝɣɿɞɻ ɣȾ ȩȝɗȩɇɿɝ ȯȝɇɗʑ ˉ̷̶̶̶ ɝɇɗɗɇȿɰȝɝɴ ɭȳɰ ȯȝʑˊ [27] . Y ou can achieve this amount of ȩȝɗȩɇɿɝ ɇɞɻȝɕȳ Ȩʑ ɇɞȩɗɿȯɇɞȿ ɰɇȩɄ ɴɣɿɰȩȳɴ ɣȾ ȩȝɗȩɇɿɝ ɇɞ ʑɣɿɰ ȯɇȳɻʲ ǼɄȳ ɰɇȩɄȳɴɻ ɴɣɿɰȩȳɴ ɣȾ ȩȝɗȩɇɿɝ ȝɰȳ ɝɇɗɕ ȝɞȯ ȯȝɇɰʑ ɭɰɣȯɿȩɻɴʳ ȝɴ ɴɄɣʋɞ ɇɞ Ǽ ȝȨɗȳ ̻ʲ
ǼȝȨɗȳ ̻ʲ ȌɄȝɻ ɇɴ ȳɯɿɇʊȝɗȳɞɻ ɻɣ ɻɄȳ ȩȝɗȩɇɿɝ ɇɞ ̷ ȩɿɭ ɣȾ ɝɇɗɕ ˉ̶̶̹ ɝȿ ȩȝɗȩɇɿɝˊʹ
- ̷ ȩɿɭ ɣȾ ʑɣȿɿɰɻ ˉɗɣʋ Ⱦȝɻ ɣɰ ɴɕɇɝɝȳȯˊ
- ̶̻ ȿɰȝɝɴ ɣȾ ʋɄɇɻȳ ɗɣʋ ɴȝɗɻ ȩɄȳȳɴȳ
Ƭȝɗȩɇɿɝ ɰɇȩɄ ȝɗɻȳɰɞȝɻɇʊȳɴ ȝɰȳ ɴɄɣʋɞ ɇɞ Ǽ ȝȨɗȳ ̼ [14, 28-31] ʲ Ǌɞ ȩȝɴȳ ʑɣɿ Ʉȝʊȳ ȝ ɗɣʋ ȯɇȳɻȝɰʑ ɇɞɻȝɕȳ ɣȾ ȩȝɗȩɇɿɝʳ ʑɣɿɰ ȯɣȩɻɣɰ ɝȝʑ ɭɰȳɴȩɰɇȨȳ ʑɣɿ ȩȝɗȩɇɿɝ ɴɿɭɭɗȳɝȳɞɻɴʲ

### 4.8.4. Iron
Ǌɰɣɞ ȯȳʟȩɇȳɞȩʑ ɇɴ ɣɞȳ ɣȾ ɻɄȳ ɝȝɒɣɰ ȩȝɿɴȳɴ ɣȾ ȝɞȳɝɇȝʳ ʋɄɇȩɄ ɇɴ ȩɄȝɰȝȩɻȳɰɇʗȳȯ Ȩʑ Ⱦȝɻɇȿɿȳʳ ʋȳȝɕɞȳɴɴʳ ɴɄɣɰɻɞȳɴɴ ɣȾ ȨɰȳȝɻɄʳ ɭȝɗȳɞȳɴɴ ɣȾ ɻɄȳ ɴɕɇɞʳ  ɄȳȝȯȝȩɄȳɴʳ  ȩɄȳɴɻ  ɭȝɇɞ  ȝɞȯ  ɇɰɰȳȿɿɗȝɰ  ɄȳȝɰɻȨȳȝɻɴ [32] . Ơɞȳɝɇȝ ȩȝɞ ȝɗɴɣ ɗȳȝȯ ɻɣ ɭɰȳȿɞȝɞȩʑ ȩɣɝɭɗɇȩȝɻɇɣɞɴ ȝɞȯ ɭɰȳɻȳɰɝ ɗȝȨɣɰ ˉȳȝɰɗʑ ɗȝȨɣɰˊ ɇȾ ɞɣɻ ɻɰȳȝɻȳȯʲ Ǽɣ ɭɰȳʊȳɞɻ ȝɞȳɝɇȝʳ ʑɣɿ ɞȳȳȯ ɻɣ ȩɣɞɴɿɝȳ ɇɰɣɞ˅ɰɇȩɄ Ⱦɣɣȯɴ ȯȝɇɗʑʲ Ǽ ȝȨɗȳ ̽ ɭɰɣʊɇȯȳɴ ȳʐȝɝɭɗȳɴ ɣȾ ȝɞɇɝȝɗ˅ based foods containing iron [33] ʳ ʋɄɇɗȳ Ǽ ȝȨɗȳ ̾ ɗɇɴɻɴ ȳʐȝɝɭɗȳɴ ɣȾ ɭɗȝɞɻ˅Ȩȝɴȳȯ Ⱦɣɣȯɴ ȩɣɞɻȝɇɞɇɞȿ ɇɰɣɞ [34] .
Ǌɻ ɇɴ ɇɝɭɣɰɻȝɞɻ ɻɣ ɞɣɻȳ ɻɄȝɻ ɻɄȳ Ȩɣȯʑ ɝɣɰȳ ȳȝɴɇɗʑ ȝȨɴɣɰȨɴ ɇɰɣɞ Ⱦɰɣɝ ȝɞɇɝȝɗ ɴɣɿɰȩȳɴ ˉɄȳɝȳ˅ɇɰɣɞˊ ȝɴ ȩɣɝɭȝɰȳȯ ɻɣ ɇɰɣɞ Ⱦɰɣɝ ɭɗȝɞɻ ɴɣɿɰȩȳɴ ˉɞɣɞ˅Ʉȳɝȳ ɇɰɣɞˊʲ Ǽɣ ȳɞɄȝɞȩȳ ɻɄȳ ȝȨɴɣɰɭɻɇɣɞ ɣȾ ɇɰɣɞ Ⱦɰɣɝ ɭɗȝɞɻ˅Ȩȝɴȳȯ Ⱦɣɣȯɴʳ ɻɄȳ Ȩɣȯʑ ɞȳȳȯɴ ʊɇɻȝɝɇɞ Ƭʲ ǁɣɣȯɴ ɻɄȝɻ ȝɰȳ ɰɇȩɄ ɇɞ ʊɇɻȝɝɇɞ Ƭ ɇɞȩɗɿȯȳʴ ɻɣɝȝɻɣȳɴʳ ɭȳɭɭȳɰɴʳ Ȩɰɣȩȩɣɗɇʳ ɴɻɰȝʋȨȳɰɰɇȳɴʳ ȝɞȯ ɣɰȝɞȿȳɴʳ ȝɴ ʋȳɗɗ ȝɴ ɣɻɄȳɰ ȩɇɻɰɿɴ Ⱦɰɿɇɻɴʲ
ǁɿɰɻɄȳɰɝɣɰȳʳ ɰȳɴɻɰɇȩɻ ȯɰɇɞɕɇɞȿ ɻȳȝ ɣɰ ȩɣʜȳȳ ȯɿɰɇɞȿ ȝ meal or at least one hour before or after a meal, as these  beverages  contain  substances  that  decrease ɇɰɣɞ ȝɞȯ ȩȝɗȩɇɿɝ ȝȨɴɣɰɭɻɇɣɞʲ
ǊȾ  ʑɣɿ ȝɗɰȳȝȯʑ ɴɿʜȳɰ Ⱦɰɣɝ ȝɞȳɝɇȝʳ ʑɣɿɰ ȯɣȩɻɣɰ ʋɇɗɗ ɭɰȳɴȩɰɇȨȳ  ʑɣɿ  ɇɰɣɞ  ɴɿɭɭɗȳɝȳɞɻɴʲ

### 4.8.5. Other vitamin/mineral supplementation
Ǌɞ ȩȝɴȳ ʑɣɿ ȝɰȳ ɞɣɻ ȝȨɗȳ ɻɣ ȩɣɞɴɿɝȳ ȝɞ ȝȯȳɯɿȝɻȳ ȝɞȯ Ȩȝɗȝɞȩȳȯ ȯɇȳɻ ˉȾɣɰ ȝɞʑ ɰȳȝɴɣɞˊʳ ʑɣɿɰ ȯɣȩɻɣɰ ʋɇɗɗ ȝȯʊɇɴȳ ʑɣɿ ɣɞ ʋɄɇȩɄ ɣɻɄȳɰ ʊɇɻȝɝɇɞ ȝɞȯ ɝɇɞȳɰȝɗ ɴɿɭɭɗȳɝȳɞɻɴ ʑɣɿ ɞȳȳȯ ɻɣ ɻȝɕȳʲ
Ǯɗȳȝɴȳ ɕȳȳɭ ɇɞ ɝɇɞȯ ɻɄȝɻ ɻɣɣ ɝɿȩɄ ʊɇɻȝɝɇɞ Ơ ɇɞ ɻɄȳ Ⱦɣɰɝ ɣȾ ɰȳɻɇɞɣɗ ɝȝʑ ɇɞȩɰȳȝɴȳ ɻɄȳ ɰɇɴɕ ɣȾ ȨɇɰɻɄ ȯȳȾȳȩɻɴ ɇɞ ʑɣɿɰ ȨȝȨʑ ˉȯɿɰɇɞȿ ɭɰȳȿɞȝɞȩʑˊ [35] ʲ ǼɄɇɴ ɇɴ ɣȾ ȩɣɞȩȳɰɞ ȳɴɭȳȩɇȝɗɗʑ ɇȾ ʑɣɿ ȝɰȳ ɻȝɕɇɞȿ ɝȳȯɇȩȝɻɇɣɞɴ ɻɄȝɻ ȩɣɞɻȝɇɞ ɗȝɰȿȳ ȝɝɣɿɞɻɴ ɣȾ ɰȳɻɇɞɣɇȯ ˉȝ Ⱦɣɰɝ ɣȾ ʊɇɻȝɝɇɞ Ơ ɿɴȳȯ ɻɣ ɻɰȳȝɻ ɴȳʊȳɰȳ ȝȩɞȳˊʲ

CHAPTER 1 DIET AND LIFESTYLE BEFORE PREGNANCY > Dietary Recommendations During the Pre-Pregnancy Period > 4.8.5. Other vitamin/mineral supplementation > ̺ʲ̿ʲ ǵɭȳȩɇȝɗ ɭɣɭɿɗȝɻɇɣɞ ȿɰɣɿɭɴʴ ʊȳȿȝɞ ȝɞȯ ʊȳȿȳɻȝɰɇȝɞ ʋɣɝȳɞ
#### ̺ʲ̿ʲ ǵɭȳȩɇȝɗ ɭɣɭɿɗȝɻɇɣɞ ȿɰɣɿɭɴʴ ʊȳȿȝɞ ȝɞȯ ʊȳȿȳɻȝɰɇȝɞ ʋɣɝȳɞ
ǁɣɗɗɣʋɇɞȿ ȝ ʋȳɗɗ˅ɭɗȝɞɞȳȯ ʊȳȿȳɻȝɰɇȝɞ ȯɇȳɻ ɝȝʑ Ʉȝʊȳ ɴȳʊȳɰȝɗ ɄȳȝɗɻɄ Ȩȳɞȳʟɻɴ ɇɞȩɗɿȯɇɞȿ ȝ ɰȳȯɿȩɻɇɣɞ ɇɞ ɻɄȳ ɰɇɴɕ ɣȾ ɣȨȳɴɇɻʑʳ ɻʑɭȳ ǊǊ ȯɇȝȨȳɻȳɴʳ ɄɇȿɄ Ȩɗɣɣȯ ɭɰȳɴɴɿɰȳ ȝɴ ʋȳɗɗ ȝɴ ɴɣɝȳ ɻʑɭȳɴ ɣȾ ȩȝɞȩȳɰ [36] . ǼɄȳɰȳ ɇɴ ȝ ȯɇʜȳɰȳɞȩȳ Ȩȳɻʋȳȳɞ ʊȳȿȳɻȝɰɇȝɞ ȝɞȯ ʊȳȿȝɞ ȯɇȳɻɴʳ ȝɴ Ⱦɣɗɗɣʋɴʴ
- ȋȳȿȳɻȝɰɇȝɞ ȯɇȳɻʴ ɻɄɇɴ ɇɴ ɇɞ ȿȳɞȳɰȝɗ ȩɄȝɰȝȩɻȳɰɇʗȳȯ Ȩʑ ɻɄȳ ȳʐȩɗɿɴɇɣɞ ɣȾ ȝɞɇɝȝɗ˅Ȩȝɴȳȯ ɭɰɣȯɿȩɻɴ ɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ʟɴɄʳ ɭɣɿɗɻɰʑʳ ȝɞȯ ɝȳȝɻ Ȩɿɻ ʑɣɿ ȩȝɞ ȩɣɞɴɿɝȳ ȝɞɇɝȝɗ˅Ȩȝɴȳȯ Ȩʑɭɰɣȯɿȩɻɴ ɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ɝɇɗɕ ȝɞȯ ȯȝɇɰʑ ɭɰɣȯɿȩɻɴʳ Ʉɣɞȳʑʳ ȝɞȯ ȳȿȿɴʲ
- ȋȳȿȝɞ ȯɇȳɻʴ ɻɄɇɴ ɇɴ ȩɄȝɰȝȩɻȳɰɇʗȳȯ Ȩʑ ɻɄȳ ȳʐȩɗɿɴɇɣɞ ɣȾ ȝɗɗ ȝɞɇɝȝɗ˅Ȩȝɴȳȯ ɭɰɣȯɿȩɻɴ ˉʟɴɄʳ ɭɣɿɗɻɰʑʳ ɝȳȝɻʳ ɝɇɗɕʳ ȯȝɇɰʑ ɭɰɣȯɿȩɻɴʳ Ʉɣɞȳʑʳ ɣɰ ȳȿȿɴˊʲ
ǊȾ ʑɣɿ ȝɰȳ Ⱦɣɗɗɣʋɇɞȿ ȝ ʊȳȿȳɻȝɰɇȝɞ ɣɰ ʊȳȿȝɞ ȯɇȳɻʳ ʑɣɿ ɞȳȳȯ ɻɣ ɭȝʑ ɴɭȳȩɇʟȩ ȝɻɻȳɞɻɇɣɞ ɻɣ ʑɣɿɰ ɇɞɻȝɕȳ ɣȾ  ʊɇɻȝɝɇɞ  ƫ̷̸  ȝɞȯ  ɇɰɣɞʳ  ɴɇɞȩȳ  ʑɣɿɰ  ȯɇȳɻ  ȳʐȩɗɿȯȳɴ  ʟɴɄʳ  ɭɣɿɗɻɰʑʳ  ɝȳȝɻʳ  ȝɞȯ  ɭɣɻȳɞɻɇȝɗɗʑ  ȝɞɇɝȝɗ Ȩʑɭɰɣȯɿȩɻɴʲ  ȋȳȿȝɞ  ȝɞȯ  ʊȳȿȳɻȝɰɇȝɞ  ʋɣɝȳɞ  ȝɰȳ  ɭȝɰɻɇȩɿɗȝɰɗʑ  ȝɻ  ɰɇɴɕ  ɣȾ  ʊɇɻȝɝɇɞ  ƫ̷̸  ȯȳʟȩɇȳɞȩʑʳ ɴɇɞȩȳ ɻɄɇɴ ʊɇɻȝɝɇɞ ɇɴ ɣɞɗʑ Ⱦɣɿɞȯ ɇɞ ȝɞɇɝȝɗ˅Ȩȝɴȳȯ ɭɰɣȯɿȩɻɴʲ ǂȳɞȳɰȝɗɗʑʳ ȝ ʊȳȿȝɞ ȯɇȳɻ ɰȳɯɿɇɰȳɴ ȩɗɣɴȳɰ ɝɣɞɇɻɣɰɇɞȿ Ȩʑ ȝ ȯɇȳɻɇɻɇȝɞ ɴɇɞȩȳ ɻɄȳ ɰɇɴɕ ɣȾ ɞɿɻɰɇȳɞɻ ȯȳʟȩɇȳɞȩɇȳɴ ɇɴ ɄɇȿɄȳɰ ʋɇɻɄ ɻɄɇɴ ȯɇȳɻʲ ƫɣʐ ̾ ɭɰɣʊɇȯȳɴ ɴɣɝȳ ɿɴȳȾɿɗ ɰȳȩɣɝɝȳɞȯȝɻɇɣɞɴ ɇȾ ʑɣɿ ȝɰȳ Ⱦɣɗɗɣʋɇɞȿ ȝ ʊȳȿȳɻȝɰɇȝɞ ɣɰ ʊȳȿȝɞ ȯɇȳɻʲ

#### ƫɣʐ ̾ʲ Ʋɇȳɻȝɰʑ ɰȳȩɣɝɝȳɞȯȝɻɇɣɞɴ Ⱦɣɰ ʊȳȿȳɻȝɰɇȝɞ ȝɞȯ ʊȳȿȝɞ ʋɣɝȳɞ
- Ƭɣɞɴɿɝȳ ȝ ʊȝɰɇȳɻʑ ɣȾ ɭɗȝɞɻ˅Ȩȝɴȳȯ Ⱦɣɣȯɴ ˉȨȳȝɞɴʳ ɗȳɞɻɇɗɴʳ ɻɣȾɿʳ ɴɣʑ˅Ȩȝɴȳȯ ɝȳȝɻ ɴɿȨɴɻɇɻɿɻȳɴʳ ɿɞɴȝɗɻȳȯʳ ɰȝʋ ɞɿɻɴ ȝɞȯ ɴȳȳȯɴˊ ɻɣ Ʉȳɗɭ ʑɣɿ ɝȳȳɻ ʑɣɿɰ ȯȝɇɗʑ ɰȳȩɣɝɝȳɞȯȝɻɇɣɞ ɣȾ ɭɰɣɻȳɇɞʳ ɇɰɣɞʳ ȝɞȯ ʗɇɞȩʲ
- ƬɣɝȨɇɞȳ ɗȳȿɿɝȳɴ ʋɇɻɄ ʋɄɣɗȳ ȿɰȝɇɞ ȩȳɰȳȝɗɴ ɇɞ ʑɣɿɰ ɝȳȝɗɴʲ ǼɄɇɴ ʋɇɗɗ ɇɝɭɰɣʊȳ ɻɄȳ ɯɿȝɗɇɻʑ ɣȾ ɻɄȳ ɭɰɣɻȳɇɞ you are consuming.
- Ơȯȯ  ɴɣɝȳ  ɴɣɿɰȩȳ  ɣȾ  ʊɇɻȝɝɇɞ  Ƭ  ˉɗȳɝɣɞ  ɒɿɇȩȳʳ  ɻɣɝȝɻɣȳɴʳ  ɭȳɭɭȳɰɴˊ  ɻɣ  ʑɣɿɰ  ɝȳȝɗɴ  ɻɣ  Ȩɣɣɴɻ  ɻɄȳ ȝȨɴɣɰɭɻɇɣɞ  ɣȾ  ɇɰɣɞ  Ⱦɰɣɝ  ɭɗȝɞɻ˅Ȩȝɴȳȯ  Ⱦɣɣȯɴʲ
- Ǳȳɴɻɰɇȩɻ ȯɰɇɞɕɇɞȿ ɻȳȝ ɣɰ ȩɣʜȳȳ ȯɿɰɇɞȿ ȝ ɝȳȝɗ ɣɰ ȝɻ ɗȳȝɴɻ ɣɞȳ Ʉɣɿɰ ȨȳȾɣɰȳ ɣɰ ȝȾɻȳɰ ȝ ɝȳȝɗʳ ȝɴ ɻɄȳɴȳ Ȩȳʊȳɰȝȿȳɴ ȩɣɞɻȝɇɞ ɴɿȨɴɻȝɞȩȳɴ ɻɄȝɻ ȯȳȩɰȳȝɴȳ ɇɰɣɞ ȝɞȯ ȩȝɗȩɇɿɝ ȝȨɴɣɰɭɻɇɣɞʲ
- ǊȾ ʑɣɿ ȝɰȳ Ⱦɣɗɗɣʋɇɞȿ ȝ ʊȳȿȝɞ ȯɇȳɻʳ ɝȝɕȳ ɴɿɰȳ ɻɣ ɇɞȩɗɿȯȳ Ⱦɣɣȯɴ ɻɄȝɻ ȝɰȳ ɰɇȩɄ ɇɞ ȩȝɗȩɇɿɝ ɇɞ ʑɣɿɰ ȯɇȳɻʲ ǼɄȳɴȳ ɇɞȩɗɿȯȳ ȩȝɗȩɇɿɝ Ⱦɣɰɻɇʟȳȯ ɣɰȝɞȿȳ ɒɿɇȩȳʳ ɴɣʑ ɝɇɗɕʳ ɝɿɗɿɕɄɇʑȝ ˉɒɿɻȳ ɗȳȝʊȳɴˊʳ ɴʋɇɴɴ ȩɄȝɰȯʳ ȯɰɇȳȯ ʟȿɴʳ ɻȝɄɇɞɇʳ ȯɰɇȳȯ ȝɭɰɇȩɣɻɴʳ ȝɗɝɣɞȯɴʳ ȝɞȯ Ȩɰɣȩȩɣɗɇ ˉɰȳȾȳɰ ɻɣ Ǽ ȝȨɗȳ ̼ ɣɞ ɭȝȿȳ ̸̼ˊʲ
- ǊȾ ʑɣɿ ɭɗȝɞ ɻɣ ȿȳɻ ɭɰȳȿɞȝɞɻʳ ȩɣɞɴɿɗɻ ȝ ȯɣȩɻɣɰ ɻɣ ȩɄȳȩɕ ɇȾ ʑɣɿ ɞȳȳȯ ɻɣ ɻȝɕȳ ʊɇɻȝɝɇɞ ƫ̷̸ ɴɿɭɭɗȳɝȳɞɻɴʲ
- Ƭɣɞɴɿɗɻ ʋɇɻɄ ȝ ȯɣȩɻɣɰ ɰȳȿȝɰȯɇɞȿ ʑɣɿɰ ɇɰɣɞ ɴɻȝɻɿɴ ˉȝɞȳɝɇȝˊ ȝɞȯ ɻɄȳ ɭɣɴɴɇȨɗȳ ɞȳȳȯ Ⱦɣɰ ɇɰɣɞ ɴɿɭɭɗȳɝȳɞɻɴʲ
- Ƭɣɞɴɿɗɻ ʋɇɻɄ ȝ ȯɇȳɻɇɻɇȝɞ ɻɣ Ʉȳɗɭ ʑɣɿ ȯȳʊȳɗɣɭ ȝ ʋȳɗɗ˅ɭɗȝɞɞȳȯ ȯɇȳɻʲ

## Physical Activity Recommendations
![Picture 52](images/SRC013/picture-052.png)
ǘȳɻ˔ɴ ȿȳɻ ȝȩɻɇʊȳʷ ǼɄȳ Ⱦɣɗɗɣʋɇɞȿ ɴȳȩɻɇɣɞ ʋɇɗɗ ɭɰɣʊɇȯȳ ȝ Ȩȝɴɇȩ ɿɞȯȳɰɴɻȝɞȯɇɞȿ ɣȾ ɭɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ ȝȩɻɇʊɇɻʑ ȝɞȯ ɇɻɴ ɴɿȨȩȝɻȳȿɣɰʑ ȳʐȳɰȩɇɴȳʲ Ǌɻ ȝɗɴɣ ɰȝɇɴȳɴ ȝʋȝɰȳɞȳɴɴ ɣȾ ɻɄȳ ɭɣɴɇɻɇʊȳ ɇɝɭȝȩɻ ɣȾ ɭɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ ȝȩɻɇʊɇɻʑ ɣɞ ʑɣɿɰ ɄȳȝɗɻɄ ɇɞ ȿȳɞȳɰȝɗ ȝɞȯ ɣɞ ɭɰȳɭȝɰɇɞȿ ʑɣɿ Ⱦɣɰ ȝ ɄȳȝɗɻɄʑ ɭɰȳȿɞȝɞȩʑʲ

CHAPTER 1 DIET AND LIFESTYLE BEFORE PREGNANCY > Physical Activity Recommendations > ̻ʲ̷ʲ ȌɄȝɻ ɇɴ ǮɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ Ơȩɻɇʊɇɻʑʹ
### ̻ʲ̷ʲ ȌɄȝɻ ɇɴ ǮɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ Ơȩɻɇʊɇɻʑʹ
ǮɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ  ȝȩɻɇʊɇɻʑ  ɇɴ  ȯȳʟɞȳȯ  ȝɴ  ȝɞʑ  Ȩɣȯɇɗʑ  ɝɣʊȳɝȳɞɻ  ɭɰɣȯɿȩȳȯ  Ȩʑ  ɻɄȳ  ȩɣɞɻɰȝȩɻɇɣɞ  ɣȾ  ɴɕȳɗȳɻȝɗ muscles.  This  results  in  a  substantial  increase  in  caloric  requirements  over  resting  energy ȳʐɭȳɞȯɇɻɿɰȳ [37] .
Ǌɞ ɣɻɄȳɰ ʋɣɰȯɴʳ ȳʊȳɰʑ ȝȩɻɇʊɇɻʑ ȝɭȝɰɻ Ⱦɰɣɝ ɗʑɇɞȿ ȯɣʋɞ ȝɞȯ ɴɗȳȳɭɇɞȿ ȩȝɞ Ȩȳ ȯȳʟɞȳȯ ȝɴ ɭɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ ȝȩɻɇʊɇɻʑʲ ǮɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ ȝȩɻɇʊɇɻʑ ɇɞȩɗɿȯȳɴ ȝɗɗ ȝȩɻɇʊɇɻɇȳɴʳ ɣȾ ȝɞʑ ɇɞɻȳɞɴɇɻʑʳ ɭȳɰȾɣɰɝȳȯ ȯɿɰɇɞȿ ʋȝɕɇɞȿ Ʉɣɿɰɴʲ The higher the intensity the more calories you burn. A certain intensity threshold is required ɻɣ ɣȨɻȝɇɞ ɄȳȝɗɻɄ Ȩȳɞȳʟɻɴ ɻɄɰɣɿȿɄ ɭɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ ȝȩɻɇʊɇɻʑʲ ǵɇɝɭɗʑ ɴɇɻɻɇɞȿ ȯɣʋɞ ɰȳɯɿɇɰȳɴ ɝɣɰȳ ȳɞȳɰȿʑ ȳʐɭȳɞȯɇɻɿɰȳ ɻɄȝɞ ɗʑɇɞȿ ȯɣʋɞ Ȩɿɻ ȩȝɞɞɣɻ Ȩȳ ȩɣɞɴɇȯȳɰȳȯ ȝ ɄȳȝɗɻɄ ɭɰɣɝɣɻɇɞȿ ɭɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ ȝȩɻɇʊɇɻʑ ˆ ɴɇɻɻɇɞȿ ȯɣʋɞ ɇɴ ȩɣɞɴɇȯȳɰȳȯ ɴȳȯȳɞɻȝɰʑ ȨȳɄȝʊɇɣɰ ɣɰ ɇɞȝȩɻɇʊɇɻʑʲ Ǌɞ ȩɣɞɻɰȝɴɻ ɻɣ ɻɄȝɻʳ ʑɣɿɰ ȯȝɇɗʑ ȳɰɰȝɞȯɴʳ ɿɴɇɞȿ ɻɄȳ ɴɻȝɇɰɴ ɣɰ ʋȝɗɕɇɞȿ ȩȝɞ Ȩȳ ȩɣɞɴɇȯȳɰȳȯ ȝɴ ɄȳȝɗɻɄ ɭɰɣɝɣɻɇɞȿ ɭɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ ȝȩɻɇʊɇɻʑʲ

CHAPTER 1 DIET AND LIFESTYLE BEFORE PREGNANCY > Physical Activity Recommendations > ̻ʲ̸ʲ ȌɄȝɻ ɇɴ ƶʐȳɰȩɇɴȳʹ
### ̻ʲ̸ʲ ȌɄȝɻ ɇɴ ƶʐȳɰȩɇɴȳʹ
ƶʐȳɰȩɇɴȳ ɇɴ ȯȳʟɞȳȯ ȝɴ ɭɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ ȝȩɻɇʊɇɻʑ ɻɄȝɻ ȩɣɞɴɇɴɻɴ ɣȾ ɭɗȝɞɞȳȯʳ ɴɻɰɿȩɻɿɰȳȯʳ ȝɞȯ ɰȳɭȳɻɇɻɇʊȳ Ȩɣȯɇɗʑ ɝɣʊȳɝȳɞɻɴ ȯɣɞȳ ɻɣ ɇɝɭɰɣʊȳ ɣɞȳ ɣɰ ɝɣɰȳ ȩɣɝɭɣɞȳɞɻɴ ɣȾ ɭɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ ʟɻɞȳɴɴʲ Ǌɻ ɇɴ ȩɣɞɴɇȯȳɰȳȯ ȝɞ essential  element  of  a  healthy  lifestyle [39] ʲ  ǵɻɰɿȩɻɿɰȳȯ  ȳʐȳɰȩɇɴȳ  ɇɴ  ɻɄȳ  ɝɣɴɻ  ȳʜȳȩɻɇʊȳ  ʋȝʑ  ɻɣ ɇɝɭɰɣʊȳ ʑɣɿɰ ɭɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ ʟɻɞȳɴɴʲ Ǌɞ ɻɄȳ ǰȝɻȝɰ ǟȝɻɇɣɞȝɗ ǮɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ Ơȩɻɇʊɇɻʑ ǂɿɇȯȳɗɇɞȳɴʳ ʑɣɿ ȩȝɞ ʟɞȯ ȳʐȳɰȩɇɴȳ ɰȳȩɣɝɝȳɞȯȝɻɇɣɞɴ Ⱦɣɰ ɻɄȳ ɄȳȝɗɻɄʑ ɭɣɭɿɗȝɻɇɣɞ ȝɞȯ ɻɄɣɴȳ ʋɇɻɄ ɴɭȳȩɇȝɗ ȩɣɞȯɇɻɇɣɞɴʳ ɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ɭɰȳȿɞȝɞɻ ʋɣɝȝɞʲ ǼɄȳɴȳ ȿɿɇȯȳɗɇɞȳɴ ȝɇɝ ɻɣ ȝȯʊɇɴȳ ʑɣɿ ɣɞ ɻɄȳ ȝɝɣɿɞɻ ȝɞȯ ɻʑɭȳ ɣȾ ȳʐȳɰȩɇɴȳ ɰȳɯɿɇɰȳȯ  ɻɣ  ɝȝɇɞɻȝɇɞ  ɣɰ  ɇɝɭɰɣʊȳ  ɣʊȳɰȝɗɗ  ɄȳȝɗɻɄʲ  Ǌɞ  ȝȯȯɇɻɇɣɞʳ  Ⱦɣɗɗɣʋɇɞȿ  ɻɄȳɴȳ  ɭɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ  ȝȩɻɇʊɇɻʑ ȿɿɇȯȳɗɇɞȳɴ ȩȝɞ ɰȳȯɿȩȳ ʑɣɿɰ ɰɇɴɕ ɣȾ ȩɄɰɣɞɇȩ ȯɇɴȳȝɴȳɴʲ ǱȳȾȳɰ ɻɣ ƫɣʐ ̿ Ȩȳɗɣʋ Ⱦɣɰ ȝ ɴɿɝɝȝɰʑ ɣȾ ɻɄȳɴȳ guidelines.
Ǉɣʋȳʊȳɰʳ ȝɴ ȳʐɭɗȝɇɞȳȯ ȝȨɣʊȳʳ ɞɣɞ˅ɴɻɰɿȩɻɿɰȳȯ ȯȝɇɗʑ ɭɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ ȝȩɻɇʊɇɻɇȳɴ ȩȝɞ ȝɗɴɣ Ȩȳ ɭȝɰɻ ɣȾ ʑɣɿɰ ɻɣɻȝɗ  ɭɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ  ȝȩɻɇʊɇɻɇȳɴʲ  Ȓ ɣɿɰ  ȯȝɇɗʑ  ȝȩɻɇʊɇɻɇȳɴ  ɝȝʑ  ɞɣɻ  Ȩȳ  ɭɗȝɞɞȳȯʳ  ɴɻɰɿȩɻɿɰȳȯʳ  ɰȳɭȳɻɇɻɇʊȳʳ  ɣɰ ɭɿɰɭɣɴȳȾɿɗ Ⱦɣɰ ɻɄȳ ɇɝɭɰɣʊȳɝȳɞɻ ɣȾ ʟɻɞȳɴɴʳ Ȩɿɻ ɻɄȳʑ ȩȝɞ ɴɻɇɗɗ ɰȝɇɴȳ ʑɣɿɰ Ʉȳȝɰɻ ɰȝɻȳ ȝɞȯ ɝȝɕȳ ʑɣɿ Ⱦȳȳɗ ȝ Ȩɇɻ ʋȝɰɝȳɰ ɻɄȝɞ ȝɻ ɰȳɴɻʲ ǼɄȳɴȳ ȝȩɻɇʊɇɻɇȳɴ ɇɞȩɗɿȯȳ ʋȝɗɕɇɞȿ Ⱦɰɣɝ ɭɣɇɞɻ Ơ ɻɣ ɭɣɇɞɻ ƫʳ ɿɴɇɞȿ ɻɄȳ ɴɻȝɇɰɴ ɇɞɴɻȳȝȯ ɣȾ ɻɄȳ ȳɗȳʊȝɻɣɰʳ ȩȝɰɰʑɇɞȿ ȿɰɣȩȳɰɇȳɴ ɣɰ ɭɗȝʑɇɞȿ ʋɇɻɄ ʑɣɿɰ ȩɄɇɗȯɰȳɞʲ
Ǌɞ  ȩɣɞȩɗɿɴɇɣɞʳ  ȝ  ȩɣɝȨɇɞȝɻɇɣɞ  ɣȾ  ȨɣɻɄʳ  ʑɣɿɰ  ȳʐȳɰȩɇɴȳ  ȝɞȯ  ʑɣɿɰ  Ȩȝɴɇȩ  ɭɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ  ȝȩɻɇʊɇɻɇȳɴ  ȩȝɞ  Ȩȳ ȩɣɿɞɻȳȯ  ɻɣʋȝɰȯɴ  ʑɣɿɰ  ɄȳȝɗɻɄ  ȝɞȯ  ɗɣɞȿȳʊɇɻʑ  ɭɰɣɝɣɻɇɞȿ  ȯȝɇɗʑ  ɰȳȩɣɝɝȳɞȯȳȯ  ȯɣɴȝȿȳʲ

Reserve time exclusively for your exercise. In addition, use every ɣɭɭɣɰɻɿɞɇɻʑ ɻɣ Ȩȳ ɭɄʑɴɇȩȝɗɗʑ ȝȩɻɇʊȳ ɻɄɰɣɿȿɄɣɿɻ ɻɄȳ ȯȝʑʲ Ǯȳɣɭɗȳ ɻɄȝɻ ʋȳɰȳ ɭɰȳʊɇɣɿɴɗʑ ɇɞȝȩɻɇʊȳ ȝɞȯ ɴɻȝɰɻ ȳɞȿȝȿɇɞȿ ɇɞ ɰȳȿɿɗȝɰ ɭɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ ȝȩɻɇʊɇɻʑ ɴɄɣʋ ȿɰȳȝɻ ɇɝɭɰɣʊȳɝȳɞɻɴ ɇɞ ɄȳȝɗɻɄʲ ƶʊȳɞ ɇȾ ʑɣɿ ɴɻɰɿȿȿɗȳ to meet the full recommendations or ɣɞɗʑ ȳɞȿȝȿȳ ɇɞ ɗɣʋ ɇɞɻȳɞɴɇɻʑ ȝȩɻɇʊɇɻɇȳɴʲ Anything is better than nothing ʋɄȳɞ ɇɻ ȩɣɝȳɴ ɻɣ ɭɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ activity ˍ ̶̺ˎ .

### ̻ʲ̹ʲ ȌɄȝɻ ȝɰȳ ɻɄȳ ɭɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ ȝȩɻɇʊɇɻʑ ɰȳȩɣɝɝȳɞȯȝɻɇɣɞɴʹ
ƫɣʐ ̿ Ȩȳɗɣʋ ɭɰɣʊɇȯȳɴ ʑɣɿ ʋɇɻɄ ɻɄȳ ɰȳȩɣɝɝȳɞȯȝɻɇɣɞɴ ɣɞ ɭɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ ȝȩɻɇʊɇɻʑʳ Ȩȝɴȳȯ ɣɞ ɻɄȳ ǰȝɻȝɰ National Physical Activity Guidelines ˍ̷̶ˎ .
ǮɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ ȝȩɻɇʊɇɻʑ ȩȝɞ Ȩȳ ɣȾ ɗɣʋʳ ɝɣȯȳɰȝɻȳʳ ɣɰ ʊɇȿɣɰɣɿɴ ɇɞɻȳɞɴɇɻʑʲ ǼɄɇɴ ɇɴ ȯȳɻȳɰɝɇɞȳȯ Ȩʑ ɻɄȳ ȳʜɣɰɻ ʑɣɿ ɭɿɻ ȝɞȯ ɻɄȳ ɗȳɞȿɻɄ ɣȾ ɻɇɝȳ ʑɣɿ ȳɞȿȝȿȳ ɇɞ ȝ ɴɭȳȩɇʟȩ ȳʐȳɰȩɇɴȳʲ Ơ ɝɣȯȳɰȝɻȳ ɣɰ ʊɇȿɣɰɣɿɴ˅ɇɞɻȳɞɴɇɻʑ ȳʐȳɰȩɇɴȳ ʋɇɗɗ ɝȝɕȳ ʑɣɿɰ ɄȳȝɰɻȨȳȝɻ Ⱦȝɴɻȳɰ ȝɞȯ ʑɣɿ ʋɇɗɗ Ⱦȳȳɗ ʋȝɰɝȳɰʲ ǼɄȳ ɄɇȿɄȳɰ ɻɄȳ ɇɞɻȳɞɴɇɻʑ ʑɣɿ choose the more calories you burn.

#### Box 9. Recommendations for physical activity (for healthy adults)
- ǵȳɻ ȝ ȿɣȝɗ Ⱦɣɰ ȳʐȳɰȩɇɴɇɞȿ ˉȩɄɣɣɴȳ ɣɞȳ ɣȾ ɻɄȳ Ȩȳɗɣʋˊʴ
- Ơɻ ɗȳȝɴɻ ̶̹ ɝɇɞɿɻȳɴ ɣȾ ɝɣȯȳɰȝɻȳ˅ɇɞɻȳɞɴɇɻʑ ɭɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ ȝȩɻɇʊɇɻʑ ̻ ȯȝʑɴʿʋȳȳɕʲ ƶʐȝɝɭɗȳɴ ɇɞȩɗɿȯȳʴ Ȩɰɇɴɕ ʋȝɗɕɇɞȿʳ ɒɣȿȿɇɞȿʳ ȩʑȩɗɇɞȿʳ ȝɞȯ ɴʋɇɝɝɇɞȿʲ
- Ơɻ ɗȳȝɴɻ ̸̶ ɝɇɞɿɻȳɴ ɣȾ ʊɇȿɣɰɣɿɴ˅ɇɞɻȳɞɴɇɻʑ ɭɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ ȝȩɻɇʊɇɻʑ ̹ ȯȝʑɴʿʋȳȳɕʲ ƶʐȝɝɭɗȳɴ ɇɞȩɗɿȯȳʴ ɰɿɞɞɇɞȿʳ Ⱦȝɴɻ ȩʑȩɗɇɞȿʳ ȝɞȯ ɇɞɻȳɰʊȝɗ ɻɰȝɇɞɇɞȿʲ
- Ơɻ ɗȳȝɴɻ ̸̶˅̶̹ ɝɇɞɿɻȳɴ ɣȾ ȨɣɻɄ ɇɞɻȳɞɴɇɻɇȳɴ ȩɣɝȨɇɞȳȯ ̹˅̻ ȯȝʑɴʿʋȳȳɕʲ
- ǁɣɰ ʋȳɇȿɄɻ ɗɣɴɴʳ ʑɣɿ ɝȝʑ ɞȳȳȯ ɻɣ ȳɞȿȝȿȳ ɇɞ ɝɣȯȳɰȝɻȳ ɻɣ ʊɇȿɣɰɣɿɴ˅ɇɞɻȳɞɴɇɻʑ ɭɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ ȝȩɻɇʊɇɻʑ ɣɞ ɝɣɴɻ ȯȝʑɴ ˉ̺̻˅̶̼ ɝɇɞɿɻȳɴʳ ̻ ȯȝʑɴʿʋȳȳɕˊʲ ƫɿɇɗȯ ɿɭ ȿɰȝȯɿȝɗɗʑ ȝɞȯ ȩɄɣɣɴȳ ɗɣʋ˅ ɇɝɭȝȩɻ ȳʐȳɰȩɇɴȳɴ ʋɇɻɄ ɝɇɞɇɝȝɗ ɇɝɭȝȩɻ ɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ȩʑȩɗɇɞȿʳ ɴʋɇɝɝɇɞȿʳ ɣɰ Ȩɰɇɴɕ ʋȝɗɕɇɞȿʲ
- ƶɞȿȝȿȳ ɇɞ ɝɿɴȩɗȳ ȝɞȯ Ȩɣɞȳ˅ɴɻɰȳɞȿɻɄȳɞɇɞȿ ȳʐȳɰȩɇɴȳɴ ȝɻ ɗȳȝɴɻ ɻʋɇȩȳ ȝ ʋȳȳɕ ˉɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ɿɴɇɞȿ ɻɄȳ ɴɻȝɇɰɴʳ ɗɇȾɻɇɞȿ ʋȳɇȿɄɻɴˊʳ ȝɞȯ ɿɴȳ ɝɣȯȳɰȝɻȳ ʋȳɇȿɄɻɴ ȝɇɝɇɞȿ Ⱦɣɰ ̾˅̷̸ ɰȳɭȳɻɇɻɇɣɞɴʽ ȝɞȯ ̷˅̸ ɴȳɻɴ ɭȳɰ ȳʐȳɰȩɇɴȳʲ Ǌɞȩɗɿȯȳ ȝ ̻ ɻɣ ̷̶ ɝɇɞɿɻȳɴ ʋȝɰɝ ɿɭʲ
- ƫȳɞȳʟɻ Ⱦɰɣɝ ɿɴɇɞȿ ɻɄȳ ɴɻȝɇɰɴ ɇɞɴɻȳȝȯ ɣȾ ɻɄȳ ȳɗȳʊȝɻɣɰʳ ɭɗȝʑɇɞȿ ʋɇɻɄ ʑɣɿɰ ȩɄɇɗȯɰȳɞʳ ɭȝɰɕɇɞȿ ɻɄȳ ȩȝɰ ȾɿɰɻɄȳɰ ȝʋȝʑʳ ȝɞȯ ʋȝɗɕɇɞȿʲ
- ƶɞɒɣʑ ʟɻɞȳɴɴ ȩɗȝɴɴȳɴ ȝɞȯ ȳɞȩɣɿɰȝȿȳ ʑɣɿɰ Ⱦɰɇȳɞȯɴ ɣɰ Ⱦȝɝɇɗʑ ɝȳɝȨȳɰɴ ɻɣ ɒɣɇɞ ʑɣɿʲ
- Ǟȝɕȳ ɴɿɰȳ ɻɣ ȿɰȝȯɿȝɗɗʑ ɇɞȩɰȳȝɴȳ ʑɣɿɰ ɗȳʊȳɗ ɣȾ ɭɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ ȝȩɻɇʊɇɻʑ ɇʲȳʲʳ ȯɿɰȝɻɇɣɞʳ Ⱦɰȳɯɿȳɞȩʑʳ and intensity.
- ǖȳȳɭ ʑɣɿɰɴȳɗȾ Ʉʑȯɰȝɻȳȯ ȝɻ ȝɗɗ ɻɇɝȳɴ ʋɄȳɞ ȳʐȳɰȩɇɴɇɞȿ Ⱦɣɰ Ȩȳɻɻȳɰ ɭɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ ȝɞȯ ɝȳɞɻȝɗ ɭȳɰȾɣɰɝȝɞȩȳʲ
- Ǳȳȯɿȩȳ ʑɣɿɰ ɻɇɝȳ ɴɭȳɞɻ ɗɣɣɕɇɞȿ ȝɻ ɴȩɰȳȳɞɴ ˉɻȳɗȳʊɇɴɇɣɞʳ ȩɣɝɭɿɻȳɰʳ ɻȝȨɗȳɻʳ ɝɣȨɇɗȳ ɭɄɣɞȳɴˊ Ȩʑ ɻȝɕɇɞȿ Ⱦɰȳɯɿȳɞɻʳ ȝȩɻɇʊȳ Ȩɰȳȝɕɴ ȳʊȳɰʑ ̸̶˅̶̹ ɝɇɞɿɻȳɴʲ
ʽ Ǳȳɭȳɻɇɻɇɣɞʴ ɣɞȳ ȩɣɝɭɗȳɻȳ ɝɣʊȳɝȳɞɻ ɣȾ ȝ ɭȝɰɻɇȩɿɗȝɰ ȳʐȳɰȩɇɴȳ

##### ̻ʲ̺ʲ ǼɄȳ ǁǊǼǼ Ǯɰɇɞȩɇɭɗȳ ˆ ǵɻȝʑ ǁɇɻˉɻˊ
Ȓɣɿ ɴɄɣɿɗȯ ɕɞɣʋ ȝȨɣɿɻ ɻɄȳ ǁǊǼǼ Ǯɰɇɞȩɇɭɗȳ ɻɣ ȾɿɰɻɄȳɰ ɿɞȯȳɰɴɻȝɞȯ ɭɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ ȝȩɻɇʊɇɻʑ ɰȳȩɣɝɝȳɞȯȝɻɇɣɞɴʲ Ǌɻ ɇɴ ɰȳȩɣɝɝȳɞȯȳȯ ɻɄȝɻ ʑɣɿ ȳɞȿȝȿȳ ɇɞ ɭɄʑɴɇȩȝɗ ȝȩɻɇʊɇɻʑ ȝɻ ɗȳȝɴɻ ̻ ȯȝʑɴ ȝ ʋȳȳɕ ˉǁɰȳɯɿȳɞȩʑˊʳ ʋɇɻɄ ȝ ɝɣȯȳɰȝɻȳ ɇɞɻȳɞɴɇɻʑ ˉǊɞɻȳɞɴɇɻʑˊʳ Ⱦɣɰ ȝ ɝɇɞɇɝɿɝ ɣȾ ̶̹ ɝɇɞɿɻȳɴ ɭȳɰ ȯȝʑ ˉǼɇɝȳˊʲ ǼɄȳ ɰȳȩɣɝɝȳɞȯȳȯ ȝȩɻɇʊɇɻʑ ˉǼʑɭȳˊ ȩȝɞ Ȩȳ ȝɞʑ ȩɣɞɻɇɞɿɣɿɴ ȳʐȳɰȩɇɴȳ ɻɄȝɻ ɿɴȳɴ Ȩɇȿ ɝɿɴȩɗȳ ȿɰɣɿɭɴ ɴɿȩɄ ȝɴ ʋȝɗɕɇɞȿʳ ȩʑȩɗɇɞȿʳ ɣɰ ɴʋɇɝɝɇɞȿ ˍ̷̶ˎ .
